item.title: Zendone - Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Fixense Last Updated: February 24, 2026

Introduction

Fixense (“we”, “our”, or “the app”) is a personal finance utility that helps you track fixed recurring expenses. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

Information We Collect

Information You Provide

  • Financial data: Expense names, amounts, categories, billing cycles, and monthly income that you manually enter into the app.
  • Preferences: Your chosen app language, notification settings, and display preferences.

All financial data you enter is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to our servers. We do not have access to your financial information.
item.content:
Privacy Policy

Fixense Last Updated: February 24, 2026

Introduction

Fixense (“we”, “our”, or “the app”) is a personal finance utility that helps you track fixed recurring expenses. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

Information We Collect

Information You Provide

  • Financial data: Expense names, amounts, categories, billing cycles, and monthly income that you manually enter into the app.
  • Preferences: Your chosen app language, notification settings, and display preferences.

All financial data you enter is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to our servers. We do not have access to your financial information.

Information Collected Automatically

  • Advertising data: We use Google AdMob to display ads in the free version of the app. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for the purpose of serving personalized or non-personalized ads. Please refer to Google’s Privacy Policy for more details.

Information We Do NOT Collect

  • Personal identification (name, email, phone number, address)
  • Location data
  • Contacts or call logs
  • Photos or media
  • Health data
  • Browsing history
  • Purchase history outside the app

How We Use Your Information

Data Purpose Storage
Expense & income data App functionality (tracking, analysis, reminders) On-device only
App preferences Personalize your experience On-device only
Advertising identifiers Serve ads (free version only) Processed by Google AdMob

iCloud Backup

If you are a premium member and choose to use the iCloud backup feature, your expense data is stored in your personal iCloud account via Apple’s iCloud Documents. This data is:

  • Encrypted by Apple in transit and at rest
  • Accessible only through your Apple ID
  • Not accessible by us or any third party
  • Stored and deleted at your discretion

We do not operate any cloud servers. The iCloud backup feature uses Apple’s infrastructure exclusively.

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

The free version of Fixense displays ads provided by Google AdMob. AdMob may collect and process certain data as described in:

  • Google Privacy Policy
  • How Google Uses Information from Sites or Apps

Premium members who purchase the lifetime membership will have all ads removed, and no advertising data will be collected.

Apple StoreKit

We use Apple’s StoreKit framework to process in-app purchases. All payment information is handled entirely by Apple. We do not collect, store, or have access to any payment or billing information.

Apple Push Notification Service

If you enable payment reminders, we use Apple’s local notification system to deliver reminders. These notifications are scheduled entirely on your device and do not involve any external server.

Data Security

  • All expense data is stored locally on your device using Apple’s SwiftData framework.
  • Optional biometric authentication (Face ID / Touch ID) is available for premium members to protect app access.
  • We do not transmit your financial data over the internet (except to your own iCloud account if you explicitly choose to back up).

Children’s Privacy

Fixense does not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13. The app does not require account creation or any personal information to function.

Your Rights

Since all your data is stored locally on your device, you have full control:

  • Access: All your data is visible within the app at all times.
  • Export: Premium members can export data as PDF or CSV.
  • Delete: Uninstalling the app removes all locally stored data. iCloud backups can be managed through your device’s iCloud settings.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected by updating the “Last Updated” date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: (suiyun@me.com)

This privacy policy applies to the Fixense app available on the Apple App Store.

item.title: Privacy Policy for 算了么
item.description:
算了么 - 卦算天机 隐私政策 / PRIVACY POLICY

最后更新日期：2026年1月15日 Last Updated: January 15, 2026

================================================================================ 中文版本 | CHINESE VERSION

  1. 概述

欢迎使用"算了么 - 卦算天机"应用（以下简称"本应用"）。我们非常重视您的隐私保护和个人信息安全。本隐私政策将向您说明本应用如何收集、使用、存储和保护您的个人信息。

  1. 信息收集

2.1 我们收集的信息

本应用可能收集以下类型的信息： • 出生日期和时间：用于生辰八字计算和命理分析 • 星座选择信息：用于星座运势和配对测试 • MBTI类型选择：用于性格分析 • 设备传感器数据：加速度计数据，仅用于摇卦功能的动作检测

2.2 我们不收集的信息

• 姓名、电话号码、电子邮件等个人身份信息 • 设备标识符（IDFA、设备ID等） • 地理位置信息 • 通讯录或相册等设备数据 • 任何支付信息

  1. 信息使用

我们收集的所有信息仅用于以下目的： • 提供生辰八字、星座、易经、塔罗牌等占卜和命理分析功能 • 实现摇卦、抽签等互动功能 • 改善应用性能和用户体验

重要声明：所有数据处理均在您的设备上本地完成，我们不会将任何数据发送到远程服务器。

  1. 数据存储

• 所有数据仅存储在您的设备本地存储中 • 我们不使用任何云端服务器或数据库 • 您的数据不会离开您的设备 • 卸载应用后，所有本地数据将被自动删除

  1. 数据分享

我们承诺： • 不会向任何第三方出售、出租或交易您的个人信息 • 不会与任何广告商或营销公司分享您的数据 • 不会将您的数据用于用户追踪或分析 • 不会向任何服务器传输您的个人数据
item.content:
算了么 - 卦算天机 隐私政策 / PRIVACY POLICY

最后更新日期：2026年1月15日 Last Updated: January 15, 2026

================================================================================ 中文版本 | CHINESE VERSION

  1. 概述

欢迎使用"算了么 - 卦算天机"应用（以下简称"本应用"）。我们非常重视您的隐私保护和个人信息安全。本隐私政策将向您说明本应用如何收集、使用、存储和保护您的个人信息。

  1. 信息收集

2.1 我们收集的信息

本应用可能收集以下类型的信息： • 出生日期和时间：用于生辰八字计算和命理分析 • 星座选择信息：用于星座运势和配对测试 • MBTI类型选择：用于性格分析 • 设备传感器数据：加速度计数据，仅用于摇卦功能的动作检测

2.2 我们不收集的信息

• 姓名、电话号码、电子邮件等个人身份信息 • 设备标识符（IDFA、设备ID等） • 地理位置信息 • 通讯录或相册等设备数据 • 任何支付信息

  1. 信息使用

我们收集的所有信息仅用于以下目的： • 提供生辰八字、星座、易经、塔罗牌等占卜和命理分析功能 • 实现摇卦、抽签等互动功能 • 改善应用性能和用户体验

重要声明：所有数据处理均在您的设备上本地完成，我们不会将任何数据发送到远程服务器。

  1. 数据存储

• 所有数据仅存储在您的设备本地存储中 • 我们不使用任何云端服务器或数据库 • 您的数据不会离开您的设备 • 卸载应用后，所有本地数据将被自动删除

  1. 数据分享

我们承诺： • 不会向任何第三方出售、出租或交易您的个人信息 • 不会与任何广告商或营销公司分享您的数据 • 不会将您的数据用于用户追踪或分析 • 不会向任何服务器传输您的个人数据

  1. 第三方服务

本应用不使用任何第三方分析工具、广告SDK或追踪服务，包括但不限于： • Google Analytics • Facebook SDK • 广告网络（如AdMob、Facebook Audience Network等） • 用户行为分析工具

  1. 数据安全

我们采取以下措施保护您的信息安全： • 所有数据存储在设备本地，使用iOS系统的安全沙盒机制 • 不进行任何网络传输，从根本上避免数据泄露风险 • 应用代码不包含任何数据上传功能

  1. 儿童隐私

本应用面向普通大众用户。我们不会故意收集13岁以下儿童的个人信息。如果您是家长或监护人，发现您的孩子向我们提供了个人信息，请联系我们，我们将及时删除相关信息。

  1. 您的权利

您对自己的数据拥有完全控制权： • 访问权：所有数据存储在您的设备上，您可以随时查看 • 删除权：卸载应用即可删除所有本地数据 • 拒绝权：您可以选择不输入任何个人信息，但这可能影响部分功能的使用

  1. 隐私政策更新

我们可能会不定期更新本隐私政策。更新后的政策将在应用内和网站上公布，并注明最新更新日期。重大变更时，我们会在应用内进行特别提示。

  1. 适用法律

本隐私政策受中华人民共和国法律管辖。如有争议，应友好协商解决；协商不成的，应提交至本应用开发者所在地有管辖权的人民法院处理。

  1. 联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何问题、意见或建议，或需要行使您的权利，请通过以下方式联系我们：

应用名称：算了么 - 卦算天机 电子邮件：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com 响应时间：我们将在收到请求后15个工作日内回复

================================================================================ ENGLISH VERSION | 英文版本

  1. Overview

Welcome to “算了么 - 卦算天机” (hereinafter referred to as “the App”). We take your privacy protection and personal information security very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how the App collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information.

  1. Information Collection

2.1 Information We Collect

The App may collect the following types of information: • Date and Time of Birth: Used for BaZi calculations and fortune analysis • Zodiac Sign Selection: Used for horoscope and compatibility tests • MBTI Type Selection: Used for personality analysis • Device Sensor Data: Accelerometer data, used only for motion detection in divination features

2.2 Information We Do NOT Collect

• Personal identification information such as name, phone number, or email • Device identifiers (IDFA, device ID, etc.) • Geolocation information • Device data such as contacts or photos • Any payment information

  1. Information Usage

All information we collect is used solely for the following purposes: • Providing BaZi, zodiac, I Ching, tarot, and other divination and fortune analysis features • Implementing interactive features such as coin tossing and card drawing • Improving app performance and user experience

Important Notice: All data processing is performed locally on your device. We do not transmit any data to remote servers.

  1. Data Storage

• All data is stored only in your device’s local storage • We do not use any cloud servers or databases • Your data never leaves your device • All local data will be automatically deleted after uninstalling the app

  1. Data Sharing

We promise: • We will NOT sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party • We will NOT share your data with any advertisers or marketing companies • We will NOT use your data for user tracking or analytics • We will NOT transmit your personal data to any servers

  1. Third-Party Services

The App does NOT use any third-party analytics tools, advertising SDKs, or tracking services, including but not limited to: • Google Analytics • Facebook SDK • Ad networks (such as AdMob, Facebook Audience Network, etc.) • User behavior analytics tools

  1. Data Security

We take the following measures to protect your information security: • All data is stored locally on the device using iOS system’s secure sandbox mechanism • No network transmission occurs, fundamentally avoiding data breach risks • The app code does not include any data upload functionality

  1. Children’s Privacy

The App is intended for general audience users. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will promptly delete such information.

  1. Your Rights

You have complete control over your data: • Right to Access: All data is stored on your device and you can view it at any time • Right to Delete: Uninstalling the app will delete all local data • Right to Refuse: You may choose not to enter any personal information, though this may affect the use of certain features

  1. Privacy Policy Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updated policies will be published in the app and on our website with the latest update date noted. For significant changes, we will provide special notice within the app.

  1. Applicable Law

This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of the People’s Republic of China. In case of disputes, they should be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, they should be submitted to the people’s court with jurisdiction in the location of the app developer.

  1. Contact Us

If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, or need to exercise your rights, please contact us through the following means:

App Name: 算了么 - 卦算天机 Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com Response Time: We will respond within 15 business days of receiving your request

================================================================================ END OF PRIVACY POLICY

item.title: Privacy Policy for DanceTrace
item.description:
Privacy Policy for DanceTrace (舞迹)

Last Updated: January 13, 2026

Introduction

DanceTrace (“we,” “our,” or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our iOS application.

Information We Collect

1. Information You Provide Directly

Dance Practice Data:

  • Dance classes information (class name, date, time, location, teacher, dance style)
  • Skill elements and proficiency ratings
  • Practice reflections and notes
  • Studio and teacher information you add

Videos:
item.content:
Privacy Policy for DanceTrace (舞迹)

Last Updated: January 13, 2026

Introduction

DanceTrace (“we,” “our,” or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our iOS application.

Information We Collect

1. Information You Provide Directly

Dance Practice Data:

  • Dance classes information (class name, date, time, location, teacher, dance style)
  • Skill elements and proficiency ratings
  • Practice reflections and notes
  • Studio and teacher information you add

Videos:

  • Practice videos you record using the in-app camera
  • Teacher demonstration videos you import from your photo library
  • Video comparisons you create

2. Information Automatically Collected

Device Information:

  • Device type and model
  • Operating system version
  • App version
  • Local storage usage statistics

Usage Data:

  • Features you use within the app
  • Frequency and duration of app usage
  • Performance and crash data (anonymous)

How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information solely for the following purposes:

  1. Core Functionality:

    • Store and organize your dance practice records
    • Provide video comparison and playback features
    • Track your skill development progress
    • Generate practice insights and statistics

  2. App Improvement:

    • Analyze app performance and fix bugs
    • Understand feature usage to improve user experience
    • Optimize video processing and AI tracking features

  3. Local Notifications:

    • Send reminders for upcoming dance classes (if you enable notifications)

Data Storage and Security

Local Storage

  • All your data is stored locally on your device using iOS secure storage (UserDefaults and Core Data)
  • Videos are saved in the app’s local file system, not uploaded to external servers
  • Your practice data, reflections, and skill ratings remain on your device

iCloud Sync (Optional)

  • If you enable iCloud sync in Settings, your data will be synchronized across your Apple devices using your iCloud account
  • This data is encrypted and protected by Apple’s iCloud security
  • We do not have access to your iCloud data

Security Measures

  • All data is protected by iOS system-level encryption
  • We do not transmit your personal data to external servers
  • No third-party analytics or advertising SDKs are integrated

Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or share your personal information with third parties.

We may only disclose information if:

  • Required by law or legal process
  • Necessary to protect our rights or safety
  • You explicitly authorize us to share specific data

Your Rights and Choices

You have complete control over your data:

Access and Export

  • All your data is accessible within the app at any time
  • You can export videos to your photo library

Deletion

  • Delete individual classes, videos, or skills within the app
  • Uninstalling the app will permanently remove all locally stored data
  • If using iCloud sync, delete data from iCloud settings in your device

Permissions Management

  • Camera Access: Required for recording practice videos (can be revoked in iOS Settings)
  • Photo Library Access: Required for importing and exporting videos (can be revoked in iOS Settings)
  • Microphone Access: Required for recording audio with videos (can be revoked in iOS Settings)
  • Notifications: Optional, can be disabled in iOS Settings

Camera and Photo Library Access

  • Camera: Used solely for recording your dance practice videos within the app
  • Photo Library Read: Used to import teacher demonstration videos or existing practice videos
  • Photo Library Write: Used to save your practice videos and comparison videos to your photo library
  • We do not access, upload, or share any photos or videos beyond the ones you explicitly select

AI and Video Processing

  • AI Body Tracking: Uses Apple’s Vision Framework for local on-device pose detection
  • All video processing happens locally on your device
  • No video data is sent to external servers for AI analysis
  • Pose data is used only for visual overlay and is not permanently stored

Children’s Privacy

DanceTrace is intended for users aged 13 and above. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, please contact us, and we will delete such information.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of any significant changes by:

  • Posting the new Privacy Policy in the app
  • Updating the “Last Updated” date at the top of this policy

Your continued use of DanceTrace after changes indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.

Data Retention

  • Your data is retained locally on your device until you delete it or uninstall the app
  • If using iCloud sync, data is retained in iCloud according to your iCloud storage settings
  • We do not retain any data on our servers as all processing is local

International Users

DanceTrace is designed to work globally. All data processing occurs locally on your device, regardless of your location. If you use iCloud sync, your data is stored in accordance with Apple’s iCloud Terms of Service and your regional iCloud data center.

Third-Party Services

DanceTrace uses the following Apple frameworks and services:

  • AVFoundation: For video recording and playback
  • Vision Framework: For AI pose detection (on-device only)
  • Core Data: For local data storage
  • CloudKit (Optional): For iCloud synchronization if enabled

We do not integrate any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.

Contact Us

If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact us at:

Email: [Your Contact Email]

Developer: [Your Name or Company Name]

Privacy Policy Summary

What we collect:

  • Dance practice records, videos, and notes you create

How we use it:

  • To provide core app functionality and improve your experience

Where it’s stored:

  • Locally on your device (and optionally in your iCloud account)

Who we share with:

  • No one. Your data stays with you.

Your control:

  • Complete access, export, and deletion rights at any time

SUBSCRIPTION INFORMATION

DanceMirror offers auto-renewable subscriptions to unlock premium features:

• Monthly Subscription: Billed monthly • Yearly Subscription: Billed yearly (Best value!) • Lifetime Purchase: One-time payment

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your account settings on the App Store after purchase.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ Privacy Policy: https://leviduan.github.io/posts/dancetracepp/

This Privacy Policy is available in the following languages:

  • English
  • 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)
  • 日本語 (Japanese)
  • 한국어 (Korean)

For other language versions, please refer to the in-app settings.

DanceTrace（舞迹）隐私政策

最后更新日期：2026年1月13日

简介

DanceTrace（“我们"或"本应用”）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明了当您使用我们的 iOS 应用程序时，我们如何收集、使用和保护您的信息。

我们收集的信息

1. 您直接提供的信息

舞蹈练习数据：

  • 舞蹈课程信息（课程名称、日期、时间、地点、老师、舞种）
  • 技能元素和熟练度评分
  • 练习反思和笔记
  • 您添加的舞室和老师信息

视频：

  • 使用应用内相机录制的练习视频
  • 从相册导入的老师示范视频
  • 您创建的视频对比

2. 自动收集的信息

设备信息：

  • 设备类型和型号
  • 操作系统版本
  • 应用版本
  • 本地存储使用统计

使用数据：

  • 您在应用内使用的功能
  • 应用使用频率和时长
  • 性能和崩溃数据（匿名）

我们如何使用您的信息

我们仅将收集的信息用于以下目的：

  1. 核心功能：

    • 存储和整理您的舞蹈练习记录
    • 提供视频对比和播放功能
    • 追踪您的技能发展进度
    • 生成练习洞察和统计数据

  2. 应用改进：

    • 分析应用性能并修复错误
    • 了解功能使用情况以改善用户体验
    • 优化视频处理和 AI 追踪功能

  3. 本地通知：

    • 发送即将到来的舞蹈课程提醒（如果您启用通知）

数据存储和安全

本地存储

  • 您的所有数据都本地存储在您的设备上，使用 iOS 安全存储（UserDefaults 和 Core Data）
  • 视频保存在应用的本地文件系统中，不会上传到外部服务器
  • 您的练习数据、反思和技能评分都保留在您的设备上

iCloud 同步（可选）

  • 如果您在设置中启用 iCloud 同步，您的数据将使用您的 iCloud 账户在您的 Apple 设备之间同步
  • 这些数据经过加密，受 Apple iCloud 安全保护
  • 我们无法访问您的 iCloud 数据

安全措施

  • 所有数据都受 iOS 系统级加密保护
  • 我们不会将您的个人数据传输到外部服务器
  • 未集成任何第三方分析或广告 SDK

数据共享和披露

我们不会出售、交易或与第三方共享您的个人信息。

我们仅在以下情况下披露信息：

  • 法律或法律程序要求
  • 保护我们的权利或安全所必需
  • 您明确授权我们共享特定数据

您的权利和选择

您对数据拥有完全控制权：

访问和导出

  • 您可以随时在应用内访问所有数据
  • 您可以将视频导出到相册

删除

  • 在应用内删除单个课程、视频或技能
  • 卸载应用将永久删除所有本地存储的数据
  • 如果使用 iCloud 同步，可在设备的 iCloud 设置中删除数据

权限管理

  • **相机访问：**录制练习视频所需（可在 iOS 设置中撤销）
  • **相册访问：**导入和导出视频所需（可在 iOS 设置中撤销）
  • **麦克风访问：**录制视频音频所需（可在 iOS 设置中撤销）
  • **通知：**可选，可在 iOS 设置中禁用

相机和相册访问

  • **相机：**仅用于在应用内录制您的舞蹈练习视频
  • **读取相册：**用于导入老师示范视频或现有练习视频
  • **保存到相册：**用于将您的练习视频和对比视频保存到相册
  • 我们不会访问、上传或共享您明确选择之外的任何照片或视频

AI 和视频处理

  • **AI 身体追踪：**使用 Apple Vision Framework 进行本地设备端姿态检测
  • 所有视频处理都在您的设备本地进行
  • 不会将视频数据发送到外部服务器进行 AI 分析
  • 姿态数据仅用于视觉叠加，不会永久存储

儿童隐私

DanceTrace 适用于 13 岁及以上的用户。我们不会故意收集 13 岁以下儿童的个人信息。如果您认为 13 岁以下的儿童向我们提供了个人信息，请联系我们，我们将删除此类信息。

隐私政策变更

我们可能会定期更新本隐私政策。我们将通过以下方式通知您任何重大变更：

  • 在应用中发布新的隐私政策
  • 更新本政策顶部的"最后更新日期"

您在变更后继续使用 DanceTrace 表示您接受更新后的政策。

数据保留

  • 您的数据在您删除或卸载应用之前会本地保留在您的设备上
  • 如果使用 iCloud 同步，数据将根据您的 iCloud 存储设置保留在 iCloud 中
  • 我们不会在服务器上保留任何数据，因为所有处理都是本地的

国际用户

DanceTrace 设计为全球使用。无论您身在何处，所有数据处理都在您的设备本地进行。如果您使用 iCloud 同步，您的数据将根据 Apple iCloud 服务条款和您所在地区的 iCloud 数据中心进行存储。

第三方服务

DanceTrace 使用以下 Apple 框架和服务：

  • **AVFoundation：**用于视频录制和播放
  • **Vision Framework：**用于 AI 姿态检测（仅设备端）
  • **Core Data：**用于本地数据存储
  • **CloudKit（可选）：**用于 iCloud 同步（如果启用）

我们不集成任何第三方分析、广告或跟踪服务。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策或您的个人数据有疑问、疑虑或请求，请通过以下方式联系我们：

电子邮件：[您的联系邮箱]

开发者：[您的姓名或公司名称]

隐私政策摘要

我们收集什么：

  • 您创建的舞蹈练习记录、视频和笔记

我们如何使用：

  • 提供核心应用功能并改善您的体验

存储在哪里：

  • 本地存储在您的设备上（以及可选的 iCloud 账户中）

与谁共享：

  • 无人。您的数据只属于您。

您的控制权：

  • 随时拥有完全的访问、导出和删除权

本隐私政策提供以下语言版本：

  • English（英语）
  • 简体中文
  • 日本語（日语）
  • 한국어（韩语）

其他语言版本，请参阅应用内设置。

SUBSCRIPTION INFORMATION

DanceMirror offers auto-renewable subscriptions to unlock premium features:

• Monthly Subscription: Billed monthly • Yearly Subscription: Billed yearly (Best value!) • Lifetime Purchase: One-time payment

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your account settings on the App Store after purchase.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ Privacy Policy: https://leviduan.github.io/posts/dancetracepp/

item.title: Privacy Policy for Cubby Calendar
item.description:
Last Updated: January 3, 2026

Introduction

Welcome to Cubby Calendar (“we,” “our,” or “the App”). This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our mobile application.

In short: We do not collect, store, transmit, or share any of your personal data. Everything stays on your device.

Information We Do NOT Collect

Cubby Calendar is designed with your privacy as the top priority. We do not collect any information about you, including but not limited to:
item.content:
Last Updated: January 3, 2026

Introduction

Welcome to Cubby Calendar (“we,” “our,” or “the App”). This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our mobile application.

In short: We do not collect, store, transmit, or share any of your personal data. Everything stays on your device.

Information We Do NOT Collect

Cubby Calendar is designed with your privacy as the top priority. We do not collect any information about you, including but not limited to:

  • ❌ Personal identification information (name, email, phone number, etc.)
  • ❌ Calendar entries, notes, or diary content
  • ❌ Photos or images you upload
  • ❌ Usage data or analytics
  • ❌ Device information
  • ❌ Location data
  • ❌ IP addresses
  • ❌ Cookies or tracking technologies
  • ❌ Any other personal or non-personal information

How Your Data is Stored

All data you create in Cubby Calendar, including:

  • Calendar entries and notes
  • Icons and decorations
  • Custom photos
  • Color preferences
  • Language settings
  • Text and icon size preferences

…is stored locally on your device only using iOS’s secure local storage (AsyncStorage).

What This Means:

✅ Your data never leaves your device ✅ We have no access to your information ✅ No data is transmitted to our servers (we don’t have any servers) ✅ No third parties can access your data through our app ✅ Your privacy is completely protected

Photo Library Access

The app requests access to your photo library only when you choose to:

  • Upload a custom theme image for your calendar
  • This permission is completely optional
  • Photos are stored locally on your device
  • Photos are never uploaded to any server
  • You can use the app fully without granting photo access

No Account Required

Cubby Calendar does not require:

  • ❌ Account creation
  • ❌ Email registration
  • ❌ Social media login
  • ❌ Any form of sign-up

You can start using the app immediately without providing any personal information.

No Analytics or Tracking

We do not use:

  • ❌ Analytics services (Google Analytics, Firebase, etc.)
  • ❌ Crash reporting tools
  • ❌ Advertising networks
  • ❌ Social media tracking pixels
  • ❌ Any third-party tracking or monitoring tools

No Advertising

Cubby Calendar is completely free and does not display any advertisements. We do not:

  • ❌ Show ads
  • ❌ Share data with advertisers
  • ❌ Track you for advertising purposes

Data Backup and Sync

Important: Because all data is stored locally on your device:

  • 📱 Data is not automatically backed up to the cloud
  • 📱 If you delete the app, your data will be lost
  • 📱 If you switch to a new device, your data will not transfer
  • 📱 We recommend using your device’s backup system (iCloud Backup) to preserve your data

Internet Connectivity

Cubby Calendar works completely offline. The app does not:

  • ❌ Require an internet connection
  • ❌ Make any network requests
  • ❌ Connect to any servers
  • ❌ Transmit any data over the internet

Children’s Privacy

Cubby Calendar does not collect any information from anyone, including children under the age of 13. Parents can feel confident allowing their children to use the app as no personal information is collected or shared.

Third-Party Services

We do not integrate with any third-party services that could access your data. The app is completely self-contained.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last Updated” date. Since we don’t collect any contact information, we cannot notify you directly of changes. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically.

Your Rights

Since we do not collect any data about you, there is no data to:

  • Access
  • Modify
  • Delete
  • Export
  • Or request information about

Your data is entirely under your control on your device.

Data Security

While we do not collect or store your data on any servers, we use iOS’s secure local storage mechanisms to protect your data on your device. Your device’s built-in security features (passcode, Face ID, Touch ID) provide additional protection.

International Users

Cubby Calendar can be used anywhere in the world. Since no data is collected or transmitted, there are no international data transfer concerns.

Legal Basis (GDPR Compliance)

For users in the European Union: Since we do not collect any personal data, the GDPR does not apply to our data handling practices. There is no personal data processing occurring.

California Privacy Rights (CCPA Compliance)

For California residents: We do not sell, share, or collect personal information as defined by the California Consumer Privacy Act.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email： [levi.duan.arts@gmail.com]
Developer： [Levi Duan]

Summary

Cubby Calendar respects your privacy completely:

✅ No data collection
✅ No tracking
✅ No advertising
✅ No accounts required
✅ No internet connection needed
✅ Everything stays on your device
✅ Complete privacy protection

Your calendar, your data, your privacy. 🐻📅

This privacy policy is designed to be transparent and easy to understand. We believe in complete privacy, and this policy reflects our commitment to protecting your information by simply not collecting it.

熊熊日历隐私政策

最后更新日期：2026年1月3日

引言

欢迎使用熊熊日历（以下简称"我们"、“本应用"或"App”）。本隐私政策说明了您在使用我们的移动应用程序时，我们如何处理信息。

简而言之：我们不收集、存储、传输或共享您的任何个人数据。所有内容都保存在您的设备上。

我们不收集的信息

熊熊日历在设计时将您的隐私作为首要考虑。我们不收集任何关于您的信息，包括但不限于：

  • ❌ 个人身份信息（姓名、邮箱、电话号码等）
  • ❌ 日历条目、笔记或日记内容
  • ❌ 您上传的照片或图片
  • ❌ 使用数据或分析数据
  • ❌ 设备信息
  • ❌ 位置数据
  • ❌ IP 地址
  • ❌ Cookie 或跟踪技术
  • ❌ 任何其他个人或非个人信息

您的数据如何存储

您在熊熊日历中创建的所有数据，包括：

  • 日历条目和笔记
  • 图标和装饰
  • 自定义照片
  • 颜色偏好
  • 语言设置
  • 文字和图标大小偏好

…仅存储在您的设备本地，使用 iOS 的安全本地存储（AsyncStorage）。

这意味着什么：

✅ 您的数据永远不会离开您的设备 ✅ 我们无法访问您的信息 ✅ 没有数据传输到我们的服务器（我们没有任何服务器） ✅ 第三方无法通过我们的应用访问您的数据 ✅ 您的隐私得到完全保护

相册访问权限

应用程序仅在您选择以下操作时请求访问相册：

  • 为日历上传自定义主题图片
  • 此权限完全可选
  • 照片存储在您的设备本地
  • 照片永远不会上传到任何服务器
  • 您可以在不授予相册访问权限的情况下完整使用本应用

无需账号

熊熊日历不需要：

  • ❌ 创建账号
  • ❌ 邮箱注册
  • ❌ 社交媒体登录
  • ❌ 任何形式的注册

您可以立即开始使用应用，无需提供任何个人信息。

无分析或跟踪

我们不使用：

  • ❌ 分析服务（Google Analytics、Firebase 等）
  • ❌ 崩溃报告工具
  • ❌ 广告网络
  • ❌ 社交媒体跟踪像素
  • ❌ 任何第三方跟踪或监控工具

无广告

熊熊日历完全免费，不显示任何广告。我们不会：

  • ❌ 显示广告
  • ❌ 与广告商共享数据
  • ❌ 出于广告目的跟踪您

数据备份和同步

重要提示： 由于所有数据都存储在您的设备本地：

  • 📱 数据不会自动备份到云端
  • 📱 如果您删除应用，您的数据将会丢失
  • 📱 如果您更换新设备，您的数据不会自动转移
  • 📱 我们建议使用设备的备份系统（如 iCloud 备份）来保护您的数据

网络连接

熊熊日历完全离线工作。应用不会：

  • ❌ 需要互联网连接
  • ❌ 发起任何网络请求
  • ❌ 连接到任何服务器
  • ❌ 通过互联网传输任何数据

儿童隐私

熊熊日历不从任何人（包括13岁以下的儿童）收集任何信息。家长可以放心让孩子使用本应用，因为不会收集或共享任何个人信息。

第三方服务

我们不集成任何可能访问您数据的第三方服务。本应用完全独立运行。

隐私政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。任何更改都会在本页面发布，并更新"最后更新日期"。由于我们不收集任何联系信息，无法直接通知您这些变更。我们建议您定期查看本隐私政策。

您的权利

由于我们不收集任何关于您的数据，因此没有数据可以：

  • 访问
  • 修改
  • 删除
  • 导出
  • 或请求相关信息

您的数据完全在您的设备上，由您自己控制。

数据安全

虽然我们不在任何服务器上收集或存储您的数据，但我们使用 iOS 的安全本地存储机制来保护您设备上的数据。您设备的内置安全功能（密码、Face ID、Touch ID）提供了额外的保护。

国际用户

熊熊日历可在全球任何地方使用。由于不收集或传输数据，因此不存在国际数据传输的问题。

法律依据（GDPR 合规）

对于欧盟用户：由于我们不收集任何个人数据，GDPR 不适用于我们的数据处理实践。没有进行个人数据处理。

加州隐私权（CCPA 合规）

对于加州居民：我们不出售、共享或收集《加州消费者隐私法案》定义的个人信息。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们：

邮箱： [levi.duan.arts@gmail.com]
开发者： [Levi Duan]

总结

熊熊日历完全尊重您的隐私：

✅ 不收集数据
✅ 不跟踪
✅ 无广告
✅ 无需账号
✅ 无需联网
✅ 所有内容保存在您的设备上
✅ 完全隐私保护

您的日历，您的数据，您的隐私。🐻📅

本隐私政策旨在透明且易于理解。我们相信完全的隐私保护，本政策反映了我们通过简单地不收集数据来保护您信息的承诺。

Contact Us

Summary

Cubby Calendar respects your privacy completely:

✅ No data collection
✅ No tracking
✅ No advertising
✅ No accounts required

✅ Everything stays on your device
✅ Complete privacy protection

Your calendar, your data, your privacy. 🐻📅

This privacy policy is designed to be transparent and easy to understand. We believe in complete privacy, and this policy reflects our commitment to protecting your information by simply not collecting it.

我们不集成任何可能访问您数据的第三方服务。本应用完全独立运行。

隐私政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。任何更改都会在本页面发布，并更新"最后更新日期"。由于我们不收集任何联系信息，无法直接通知您这些变更。我们建议您定期查看本隐私政策。

您的权利

由于我们不收集任何关于您的数据，因此没有数据可以：

  • 访问
  • 修改
  • 删除
  • 导出
  • 或请求相关信息

您的数据完全在您的设备上，由您自己控制。

数据安全

虽然我们不在任何服务器上收集或存储您的数据，但我们使用 iOS 的安全本地存储机制来保护您设备上的数据。您设备的内置安全功能（密码、Face ID、Touch ID）提供了额外的保护。

国际用户

熊熊日历可在全球任何地方使用。由于不收集或传输数据，因此不存在国际数据传输的问题。

法律依据（GDPR 合规）

对于欧盟用户：由于我们不收集任何个人数据，GDPR 不适用于我们的数据处理实践。没有进行个人数据处理。

加州隐私权（CCPA 合规）

对于加州居民：我们不出售、共享或收集《加州消费者隐私法案》定义的个人信息。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们：

邮箱： [levi.duan.arts@gmail.com]
开发者： [Levi Duan]

总结

熊熊日历完全尊重您的隐私：

✅ 不收集数据
✅ 不跟踪
✅ 无广告
✅ 无需账号
✅ 无需联网
✅ 所有内容保存在您的设备上
✅ 完全隐私保护

您的日历，您的数据，您的隐私。🐻📅

本隐私政策旨在透明且易于理解。我们相信完全的隐私保护，本政策反映了我们通过简单地不收集数据来保护您信息的承诺。

item.title: Privacy Policy for MusiPaper
item.description:
Privacy Policy for MusiPaper

Last Updated: January 6, 2026

Introduction

MusiPaper (“we,” “our,” or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our iOS application.

Information We Collect

Information We DO NOT Collect

MusiPaper is designed with privacy in mind. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of the following:

  • ❌ Personal identification information (name, email, phone number)
  • ❌ Location data
  • ❌ Usage analytics or behavioral data
  • ❌ Device information or identifiers
  • ❌ Contacts, photos, or other personal files
  • ❌ Browsing history or search queries

Information Stored Locally on Your Device

The following information is stored only on your device and never leaves your iPhone/iPad:
item.content:
Privacy Policy for MusiPaper

Last Updated: January 6, 2026

Introduction

MusiPaper (“we,” “our,” or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our iOS application.

Information We Collect

Information We DO NOT Collect

MusiPaper is designed with privacy in mind. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of the following:

  • ❌ Personal identification information (name, email, phone number)
  • ❌ Location data
  • ❌ Usage analytics or behavioral data
  • ❌ Device information or identifiers
  • ❌ Contacts, photos, or other personal files
  • ❌ Browsing history or search queries

Information Stored Locally on Your Device

The following information is stored only on your device and never leaves your iPhone/iPad:

  • ✅ Purchase Status: Whether you have unlocked the Pro version (stored via Apple’s StoreKit)
  • ✅ Save Count: Daily wallpaper save count for free tier users (stored in UserDefaults)
  • ✅ Last Reset Date: The date when the daily save count was last reset

This local data is:

  • Not accessible to us or any third parties
  • Automatically deleted if you uninstall the app
  • Not backed up to iCloud (by default)

How We Use Your Information

Since we don’t collect any personal information, there is nothing for us to use or share.

The app operates entirely on your device, using:

  • iTunes Search API: To fetch album artwork and music information from Apple’s public catalog
  • Photo Library Access: To save wallpapers to your device (only when you explicitly tap “Save”)

Third-Party Services

Apple Services

MusiPaper uses the following Apple services:

  1. iTunes Search API

    • Purpose: Fetch album artwork and metadata
    • Data Shared: Search queries (e.g., artist names)
    • Privacy: Queries are sent to Apple’s servers but are not associated with your identity
    • Policy: Apple Privacy Policy

  2. StoreKit (In-App Purchase)

    • Purpose: Process Pro version purchases
    • Data Shared: Purchase transaction data (handled entirely by Apple)
    • Privacy: We never see your payment information
    • Policy: Apple IAP Privacy

  3. Photo Library (Optional)

    • Purpose: Save wallpapers to your device
    • Access: Only when you explicitly tap “Save Wallpaper”
    • Privacy: We cannot access your existing photos; we can only save new images

No Third-Party Analytics or Advertising

We do not use:

  • ❌ Google Analytics, Firebase, or any analytics services
  • ❌ Facebook SDK or social media tracking
  • ❌ Advertising networks (AdMob, etc.)
  • ❌ Crash reporting tools that collect personal data

Data Security

Since all data is stored locally on your device:

  • Your data is protected by your device’s built-in security (passcode, Face ID, Touch ID)
  • We have no servers, so there’s no risk of data breaches from our side
  • Your purchase status is synced via Apple’s secure infrastructure

Children’s Privacy

MusiPaper does not knowingly collect personal information from anyone, including children under 13. Since we don’t collect any data, the app is safe for all ages.

Your Rights

You have full control over your data:

  • Delete Your Data: Uninstall the app to remove all local data
  • Reset Purchase Status: Use the “Restore Purchase” feature in the upgrade prompt
  • Revoke Photo Access: Go to iOS Settings → Privacy & Security → Photos → MusiPaper → Remove Access

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by:

  • Updating the “Last Updated” date at the top
  • Displaying an in-app notice (for significant changes)

Transparency Commitment

We believe in radical transparency:

  • ✅ This app is built to respect your privacy
  • ✅ We will never sell or share your data (because we don’t have any)
  • ✅ Future updates will maintain the same privacy-first approach

Summary: MusiPaper does not collect, store, or share any personal information. Everything happens on your device. Your privacy is our priority.

MusiPaper 隐私政策

最后更新日期： 2026年1月6日

简介

MusiPaper（“我们"或"本应用”）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明了我们在您使用本 iOS 应用程序时如何处理信息。

我们收集的信息

我们不会收集的信息

MusiPaper 在设计时充分考虑了隐私保护。我们不会收集、存储或传输以下任何信息：

  • ❌ 个人身份信息（姓名、邮箱、电话号码）
  • ❌ 位置数据
  • ❌ 使用分析或行为数据
  • ❌ 设备信息或标识符
  • ❌ 通讯录、照片或其他个人文件
  • ❌ 浏览历史或搜索记录

本地存储在您设备上的信息

以下信息仅存储在您的设备上，绝不会离开您的 iPhone/iPad：

  • ✅ 购买状态：您是否已解锁专业版（通过 Apple StoreKit 存储）
  • ✅ 保存次数：免费版用户的每日壁纸保存次数（存储在 UserDefaults）
  • ✅ 上次重置日期：每日保存次数上次重置的日期

这些本地数据：

  • 我们或任何第三方无法访问
  • 卸载应用后自动删除
  • 默认不备份到 iCloud

我们如何使用您的信息

由于我们不收集任何个人信息，因此没有任何信息可供使用或分享。

本应用完全在您的设备上运行，使用：

  • iTunes Search API：从 Apple 公开目录获取专辑封面和音乐信息
  • 相册访问权限：将壁纸保存到您的设备（仅在您明确点击"保存"时）

第三方服务

Apple 服务

MusiPaper 使用以下 Apple 服务：

  1. iTunes Search API

    • 用途：获取专辑封面和元数据
    • 共享数据：搜索查询（例如艺术家名称）
    • 隐私：查询发送到 Apple 服务器，但不与您的身份关联
    • 政策：Apple 隐私政策

  2. StoreKit（应用内购买）

    • 用途：处理专业版购买
    • 共享数据：购买交易数据（完全由 Apple 处理）
    • 隐私：我们绝不会看到您的支付信息
    • 政策：Apple IAP 隐私

  3. 相册（可选）

    • 用途：将壁纸保存到您的设备
    • 访问：仅在您明确点击"保存壁纸"时
    • 隐私：我们无法访问您的现有照片；只能保存新图片

无第三方分析或广告

我们不使用：

  • ❌ Google Analytics、Firebase 或任何分析服务
  • ❌ Facebook SDK 或社交媒体跟踪
  • ❌ 广告网络（AdMob 等）
  • ❌ 收集个人数据的崩溃报告工具

数据安全

由于所有数据都存储在您的设备本地：

  • 您的数据受设备内置安全保护（密码、Face ID、Touch ID）
  • 我们没有服务器，因此不存在我们这边的数据泄露风险
  • 您的购买状态通过 Apple 的安全基础设施同步

儿童隐私

MusiPaper 不会有意收集任何人的个人信息，包括 13 岁以下儿童。由于我们不收集任何数据，本应用对所有年龄段都是安全的。

您的权利

您对自己的数据拥有完全控制权：

  • 删除您的数据：卸载应用即可删除所有本地数据
  • 重置购买状态：在升级提示中使用"恢复购买"功能
  • 撤销相册访问：前往 iOS 设置 → 隐私与安全性 → 照片 → MusiPaper → 移除访问权限

本政策的变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。我们将通过以下方式通知您任何变更：

  • 更新顶部的"最后更新日期"
  • 显示应用内通知（针对重大变更）

透明承诺

我们相信彻底的透明度：

  • ✅ 本应用旨在尊重您的隐私
  • ✅ 我们绝不会出售或分享您的数据（因为我们根本没有）
  • ✅ 未来的更新将保持同样的隐私优先方法

总结： MusiPaper 不收集、存储或共享任何个人信息。一切都在您的设备上进行。您的隐私是我们的首要任务。

item.title: Zendone - Privacy Policy
item.description:
Last Updated / 最后更新: December 30, 2025 / 2025年12月30日

Zendone is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information.

Zendone 致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明我们如何处理您的信息。

English Version

1. Information Collection

We do NOT collect, store, or transmit any personal information.

Zendone is a privacy-first application. All your data including tasks, projects, habits, and settings are stored locally on your device only. We have no servers, no cloud storage, and no way to access your data.
item.content:
Last Updated / 最后更新: December 30, 2025 / 2025年12月30日

Zendone is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information.

Zendone 致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明我们如何处理您的信息。

English Version

1. Information Collection

We do NOT collect, store, or transmit any personal information.

Zendone is a privacy-first application. All your data including tasks, projects, habits, and settings are stored locally on your device only. We have no servers, no cloud storage, and no way to access your data.

2. Data Storage

  • Local Storage Only: All application data is stored locally on your device using secure storage mechanisms provided by iOS/Android.
  • No Cloud Backup: We do not automatically back up your data to any cloud service.
  • Your Control: You have complete control over your data. You can delete the app and all data will be removed from your device.

3. Third-Party Services

  • No Analytics: We do not use any analytics services (e.g., Google Analytics, Firebase Analytics).
  • No Advertising: We do not display ads or use advertising networks.
  • No Third-Party SDKs: We do not integrate any third-party tracking or data collection SDKs.

4. Permissions

The app may request the following permissions:

  • Notifications (optional): To send you reminders for habits and tasks. Notifications are generated locally on your device.
  • No other permissions are required or requested.

5. Children’s Privacy

Zendone does not knowingly collect any information from children. The app is suitable for all ages and contains no inappropriate content.

6. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected in the app and on this page with an updated “Last Updated” date.

7. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

  • Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

中文版本

1. 信息收集

我们不收集、存储或传输任何个人信息。

Zendone 是一款隐私优先的应用程序。您的所有数据，包括任务、项目、习惯和设置，都仅存储在您的设备本地。我们没有服务器，没有云存储，也无法访问您的数据。

2. 数据存储

  • 仅本地存储：所有应用数据使用 iOS/Android 提供的安全存储机制存储在您的设备本地。
  • 无云备份：我们不会自动将您的数据备份到任何云服务。
  • 您的控制：您完全控制自己的数据。删除应用后，所有数据将从您的设备中删除。

3. 第三方服务

  • 无分析工具：我们不使用任何分析服务（例如 Google Analytics、Firebase Analytics）。
  • 无广告：我们不展示广告或使用广告网络。
  • 无第三方 SDK：我们不集成任何第三方跟踪或数据收集 SDK。

4. 权限说明

应用可能请求以下权限：

  • 通知权限（可选）：用于发送习惯和任务提醒。通知在您的设备本地生成。
  • 不需要或请求其他权限。

5. 儿童隐私

Zendone 不会故意收集儿童的任何信息。该应用适合所有年龄段使用，不包含任何不当内容。

6. 政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。任何更改都会在应用和本页面中体现，并更新"最后更新"日期。

7. 联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们：

  • 邮箱：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Key Principles / 核心原则

✅ Privacy First / 隐私优先 - Your data never leaves your device.
您的数据永远不会离开您的设备。

✅ No Tracking / 无追踪 - We don’t track, collect, or analyze your behavior.
我们不追踪、收集或分析您的行为。

✅ No Ads / 无广告 - We will never show you ads.
我们永远不会向您展示广告。

✅ Your Control / 您的控制 - You own your data completely.
您完全拥有自己的数据。

Note: By using Zendone, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.

注意：使用 Zendone 即表示您已阅读并理解本隐私政策。

item.title: Privacy Policy - [iOS] MDX Reader
item.description:
Last Updated: December 16, 2025

Introduction

MDX Reader (“we”, “our”, or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our application.

Information We Collect

What We DON’T Collect

MDX Reader is designed with privacy in mind. We DO NOT:

  • Collect any personal information
  • Track your usage or behavior
  • Access your contacts, location, or photos
  • Use analytics or tracking services
  • Share any data with third parties
  • Require account creation or login
  • Connect to external servers

What We Store Locally

All data is stored locally on your device only:
item.content:
Last Updated: December 16, 2025

Introduction

MDX Reader (“we”, “our”, or “the app”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our application.

Information We Collect

What We DON’T Collect

MDX Reader is designed with privacy in mind. We DO NOT:

  • Collect any personal information
  • Track your usage or behavior
  • Access your contacts, location, or photos
  • Use analytics or tracking services
  • Share any data with third parties
  • Require account creation or login
  • Connect to external servers

What We Store Locally

All data is stored locally on your device only:

  • Dictionary Files: MDX/MDD dictionary files you import
  • Search History: Words you’ve looked up (stored locally)
  • Favorites: Words you’ve bookmarked (stored locally)
  • App Settings: Your preferences (font size, theme, etc.)

How We Use Your Information

All data remains on your device and is used solely to:

  • Display dictionary definitions
  • Remember your search history for quick access
  • Save your favorite words
  • Apply your personalized settings

Data Storage & Security

  • All data is stored in your device’s local storage
  • No cloud synchronization or backup occurs
  • Data is protected by your device’s security features
  • You can delete all app data at any time through Settings

Third-Party Services

MDX Reader does not use any third-party services, including:

  • Analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics, Firebase)
  • Advertising networks
  • Social media integrations
  • Cloud storage services
  • Crash reporting tools

Your Rights

You have complete control over your data:

  • Access: View all locally stored data within the app
  • Delete: Clear search history, favorites, or all data through Settings
  • Export: Dictionary files remain accessible in your device’s file system
  • Uninstall: Deleting the app removes all associated data

Children’s Privacy

MDX Reader does not collect any personal information from anyone, including children under 13. The app is safe for all ages.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. Changes will be reflected with a new “Last Updated” date. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Data Portability

Your dictionary files and data remain in standard formats:

  • MDX/MDD files: Industry-standard dictionary format
  • SQLite database: Standard database format for history and favorites

You can back up or transfer these files independently.

Summary

MDX Reader respects your privacy:

✅ No data collection - We don’t collect personal information
✅ No internet required - Works completely offline
✅ No tracking - No analytics or user tracking
✅ Local storage only - All data stays on your device
✅ No third parties - No data sharing with anyone
✅ Full control - You own and control all your data

This privacy policy is effective as of December 16, 2025.

简介

MDX Reader（“我们”、“本应用”）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明我们在您使用本应用时如何处理您的信息。

我们收集的信息

我们不收集的信息

MDX Reader 采用隐私优先的设计理念。我们不会：

  • 收集任何个人信息
  • 追踪您的使用情况或行为
  • 访问您的联系人、位置或照片
  • 使用分析或追踪服务
  • 与第三方共享数据
  • 要求账户创建或登录
  • 连接到外部服务器

我们本地存储的内容

所有数据仅存储在您的设备上：

  • 词典文件：您导入的 MDX/MDD 词典文件
  • 搜索历史：您查找过的单词（本地存储）
  • 收藏夹：您收藏的单词（本地存储）
  • 应用设置：您的偏好设置（字体大小、主题等）

我们如何使用您的信息

所有数据都保存在您的设备上，仅用于：

  • 显示词典定义
  • 记住您的搜索历史以便快速访问
  • 保存您收藏的单词
  • 应用您个性化的设置

数据存储与安全

  • 所有数据都存储在您设备的本地存储中
  • 不进行云同步或备份
  • 数据受您设备的安全功能保护
  • 您可以随时通过设置删除所有应用数据

第三方服务

MDX Reader 不使用任何第三方服务，包括：

  • 分析平台（如 Google Analytics、Firebase）
  • 广告网络
  • 社交媒体集成
  • 云存储服务
  • 崩溃报告工具

您的权利

您拥有对数据的完全控制权：

  • 访问权：在应用内查看所有本地存储的数据
  • 删除权：通过设置清除搜索历史、收藏夹或所有数据
  • 导出权：词典文件在您设备的文件系统中保持可访问
  • 注销权：删除应用会移除所有关联数据

儿童隐私

MDX Reader 不收集任何人（包括 13 岁以下儿童）的任何个人信息。本应用对所有年龄段都是安全的。

政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。变更将反映在新的"最后更新"日期中。在变更后继续使用本应用即表示您接受更新后的政策。

数据可迁移性

您的词典文件和数据采用标准格式：

  • MDX/MDD 文件：业界标准的词典格式
  • SQLite 数据库：用于历史记录和收藏夹的标准数据库格式

您可以独立备份或传输这些文件。

总结

MDX Reader 尊重您的隐私：

✅ 无数据收集 - 我们不收集个人信息
✅ 无需互联网 - 完全离线工作
✅ 无追踪 - 没有分析或用户追踪
✅ 仅本地存储 - 所有数据保留在您的设备上
✅ 无第三方 - 不与任何人共享数据
✅ 完全控制 - 您拥有和控制所有您的数据

本隐私政策自 2025年12月16日 起生效。

item.title: MDX Reader
item.description:
🎯 Product Positioning

MDX Reader - Your Professional Offline Dictionary Reader

A modern dictionary reading application designed for macOS & iOS, supporting MDX format dictionaries with complete offline functionality, privacy protection, and excellent user experience.

✨ Core Features

1. 📚 Professional Dictionary Support

  • MDX 1.x / 2.0 Format: Full support for mainstream dictionary formats
  • MDD Resource Files: Multimedia resources including images, audio, and video
  • Multi-Encoding Support: Automatic detection of UTF-8, UTF-16, and GBK
  • Multi-Dictionary Search: Query across multiple dictionaries simultaneously

2. 🔍 Intelligent Search Experience

  • Real-time Search Suggestions: Instant results as you type
  • Smart Prefix Matching: Accurately find target entries
  • Search History: Save up to 30 recent queries for quick access
  • Keyboard Navigation: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to confirm

3. 🎨 Elegant Interface Design

  • Beautiful Dark Mode: Eye-friendly for extended reading sessions
  • Polished Light Mode: Clear and bright for various environments
  • System Theme Following: Automatic switching for seamless experience
  • Highly Customizable:
    • Font selection (all system fonts available)
    • Font size adjustment (10-24px)
    • Line spacing adjustment (1.0-2.5x)
    • Custom content padding

4. ⭐ Powerful Management Features

  • Favorites Management: One-click to bookmark important entries
  • Organized by Dictionary: Clear categorical display
  • Quick Access: Tap history or favorites to view instantly
  • Smart Sorting: Most recent entries displayed first

5. 🎤 Multi-language Text-to-Speech

  • System TTS Support: Uses native macOS speech engine
  • Automatic Language Detection: Intelligently recognizes Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more
  • Natural Pronunciation: Near human-like reading quality
  • One-Click Reading: Tap to hear pronunciation

6. 🔒 Privacy-First Design

  • 100% Offline Usage: No network connection required
  • Zero Data Collection: No tracking, uploading, or analytics
  • Local Storage: All data stays on your Mac
  • No Account Required: Open and use immediately, no registration

7. 🌏 International Support

Supports 10 language interfaces:
item.content:
🎯 Product Positioning

MDX Reader - Your Professional Offline Dictionary Reader

A modern dictionary reading application designed for macOS & iOS, supporting MDX format dictionaries with complete offline functionality, privacy protection, and excellent user experience.

✨ Core Features

1. 📚 Professional Dictionary Support

  • MDX 1.x / 2.0 Format: Full support for mainstream dictionary formats
  • MDD Resource Files: Multimedia resources including images, audio, and video
  • Multi-Encoding Support: Automatic detection of UTF-8, UTF-16, and GBK
  • Multi-Dictionary Search: Query across multiple dictionaries simultaneously

2. 🔍 Intelligent Search Experience

  • Real-time Search Suggestions: Instant results as you type
  • Smart Prefix Matching: Accurately find target entries
  • Search History: Save up to 30 recent queries for quick access
  • Keyboard Navigation: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to confirm

3. 🎨 Elegant Interface Design

  • Beautiful Dark Mode: Eye-friendly for extended reading sessions
  • Polished Light Mode: Clear and bright for various environments
  • System Theme Following: Automatic switching for seamless experience
  • Highly Customizable:
    • Font selection (all system fonts available)
    • Font size adjustment (10-24px)
    • Line spacing adjustment (1.0-2.5x)
    • Custom content padding

4. ⭐ Powerful Management Features

  • Favorites Management: One-click to bookmark important entries
  • Organized by Dictionary: Clear categorical display
  • Quick Access: Tap history or favorites to view instantly
  • Smart Sorting: Most recent entries displayed first

5. 🎤 Multi-language Text-to-Speech

  • System TTS Support: Uses native macOS speech engine
  • Automatic Language Detection: Intelligently recognizes Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more
  • Natural Pronunciation: Near human-like reading quality
  • One-Click Reading: Tap to hear pronunciation

6. 🔒 Privacy-First Design

  • 100% Offline Usage: No network connection required
  • Zero Data Collection: No tracking, uploading, or analytics
  • Local Storage: All data stays on your Mac
  • No Account Required: Open and use immediately, no registration

7. 🌏 International Support

Supports 10 language interfaces:

  • 🇨🇳 Simplified Chinese
  • 🇹🇼 Traditional Chinese (Taiwan)
  • 🇭🇰 Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong)
  • 🇺🇸 English
  • 🇯🇵 Japanese (日本語)
  • 🇰🇷 Korean (한국어)
  • 🇪🇸 Spanish (Español)
  • 🇫🇷 French (Français)
  • 🇩🇪 German (Deutsch)
  • 🇷🇺 Russian (Русский)

🎯 Target Audience

Language Learners 👨‍🎓

  • Learning English, Japanese, Korean, or other foreign languages
  • Need authoritative dictionary lookups
  • Pursuing efficient learning experience

Professional Translators 👩‍💼

  • Professional translation workers
  • Need quick access to specialized terminology
  • Multi-dictionary comparison for translations

Students and Teachers 📚

  • Classroom teaching assistance
  • Homework and exam preparation
  • Academic research reference

Dictionary Enthusiasts 💎

  • Collecting various dictionaries
  • Pursuing beautiful reading experience
  • Value data privacy

Offline Users ✈️

  • Often in network-unavailable environments
  • Need reliable offline tools
  • Don’t rely on online services

🆚 Competitive Comparison

Feature MDX Reader Other Dictionary Apps
Offline Usage ✅ 100% offline ⚠️ Partial network required
Data Privacy ✅ Zero collection ⚠️ May collect data
Interface Design ✅ Modern & elegant ❌ Outdated interface
Theme Support ✅ Dark/Light modes ⚠️ Single theme only
Multi-Dictionary Search ✅ Supported ❌ Not supported
Display Customization ✅ Fully customizable ❌ Fixed styles
Multilingual UI ✅ 10 languages ⚠️ 1-2 languages
File Association ✅ Double-click to open ❌ Manual import only
Price 🆓 Free/Low-cost 💰 Potentially expensive

💡 Use Cases

Scenario 1: Foreign Language Learning

Student reading an English article
  ↓
Encounters unfamiliar word "serendipity"
  ↓
Opens MDX Reader to search
  ↓
Views detailed definition and examples
  ↓
Clicks pronunciation button to hear
  ↓
Bookmarks word for future review

Scenario 2: Professional Translation

Translator working on technical document
  ↓
Opens 3 specialized dictionaries
  ↓
Searches technical term simultaneously
  ↓
Compares explanations from different sources
  ↓
Finds most accurate translation

Scenario 3: Offline Usage

During flight without network
  ↓
Needs to look up a word
  ↓
Opens MDX Reader
  ↓
Fully functional offline
  ↓
Smooth query without delay

🚀 Quick Start

Three Steps to Begin

1. Import Dictionary 📥

  • Prepare MDX format dictionary files
  • Double-click MDX file or click “Add Dictionary”
  • Automatically imports and indexes

2. Search Words 🔍

  • Type word in search bar
  • Real-time display of search results
  • Click entry to view detailed definition

3. Manage Favorites ⭐

  • Click heart icon to bookmark entries
  • Quick access from favorites page
  • Organized by dictionary groups

🎁 Standout Features

🎨 Customizable Reading Experience

Font: Monaco, SF Mono, Menlo, or any system font
Size: 10px - 24px adjustable
Line Spacing: 1.0 - 2.5x
Padding: 8px - 48px content margins
Theme: Dark, Light, or System auto

⚡ High-Performance Design

  • Fast Search: Millisecond response time
  • Low Memory Usage: Optimized dictionary indexing
  • Smooth Scrolling: Native WebView rendering
  • Instant Switching: Seamless dictionary and theme changes

🔐 Data Security

  • Local Encryption: Sensitive data stored locally
  • Sandbox Isolation: Complies with Apple security standards
  • Minimal Permissions: Only file access required
  • Complete Removal: No residual data after uninstall

📖 Supported Dictionary Types

General Dictionaries

  • Oxford Dictionary
  • Longman Dictionary
  • Collins Dictionary
  • Merriam-Webster Dictionary

Specialized Dictionaries

  • Medical Dictionary
  • Legal Dictionary
  • Computer Terminology
  • Financial Vocabulary

Bilingual Dictionaries

  • English-Chinese
  • English-Japanese
  • English-Korean
  • Multilingual dictionaries

Learning Dictionaries

  • TOEFL Vocabulary
  • GRE Vocabulary
  • Graduate Entrance Exam Vocabulary
  • Japanese Language Proficiency Test

💬 User Testimonials (Examples)

“The interface design is very modern, dark mode is comfortable, and completely offline usage gives peace of mind.” - Language Learner

“Multi-dictionary search is so convenient, significantly improved my translation work efficiency.” - Professional Translator

“Finally, a beautiful and functional Mac dictionary app!” - Student

“Privacy protection is excellent, completely offline, all data stored locally.” - Privacy Advocate

📊 Technical Specifications

System Requirements

  • Platform: macOS
  • Minimum Version: macOS 12.0 or later
  • Architecture: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) + Intel
  • Storage: < 50 MB (excluding dictionary files)

Performance Metrics

  • Launch Time: < 1 second
  • Search Response: < 100 milliseconds
  • Entry Loading: < 200 milliseconds
  • Memory Usage: < 100 MB

Supported Files

  • Format: MDX 1.x, MDX 2.0
  • Resources: MDD (images, audio, CSS)
  • Encoding: UTF-8, UTF-16, GBK
  • Size: Supports large dictionaries (> 1GB)

🎁 Future Roadmap

Coming Soon

  • 📝 Entry note-taking feature
  • 🔄 iCloud sync (optional)
  • 📤 Export functionality (PDF, Markdown)
  • 🎯 Smart recommendations

Continuous Optimization

  • 🚀 Performance improvements
  • 🎨 More themes
  • 🌏 More languages
  • 🔍 AI-assisted search

📜 License

MDX Reader complies with standard App Store terms of use.

  • ✅ Personal and commercial use
  • ✅ No ads
  • ✅ Lifetime updates
  • ✅ Technical support

🎉 Summary

MDX Reader = Professional + Elegant + Private

  • 🎯 Professional: Full MDX format support for professional needs
  • 🎨 Elegant: Modern design providing comfortable reading experience
  • 🔒 Private: 100% offline, protecting your privacy

Why Choose MDX Reader?

  1. ✅ Completely Free (or reasonable pricing)
  2. ✅ Ready to Use: No registration, use immediately
  3. ✅ Regular Updates: Ongoing optimization and new features
  4. ✅ Community-Driven: Listen to user feedback, continuous improvement
  5. ✅ Privacy-Focused: Never collect user data

🎓 Tutorials

Video Tutorials (Planned)

  1. Quick Start (2 minutes)
  2. Advanced Features (5 minutes)
  3. Custom Settings (3 minutes)

🔥 Special Offers

Launch Promotion (Limited Time)

  • 🎉 First 1000 users get lifetime free access
  • 🎁 Free premium dictionary bundle
  • 👑 Priority technical support

Referral Rewards

  • Refer friends to download
  • Both parties receive premium features
  • Unlimited referrals

🎯 Brand Identity

Design Language

  • Color: Blue-purple gradient, combining technology and elegance
  • Icon: Simple book shape
  • Font: SF Pro Display (Apple’s official font)
  • Style: Modern, clean, professional

Brand Values

  • Professional: Focus on dictionary domain
  • Innovative: Modern interaction design
  • Reliable: Stable performance
  • Open: Welcome community participation

📣 Taglines

English

  • “Make reading dictionaries a pleasure”
  • “The most beautiful dictionary reader on Mac”
  • “Professional, Elegant, Private”
  • “More than a dictionary, your learning companion”

Multilingual

  • 🇨🇳 “让阅读词典成为一种享受”
  • 🇯🇵 “辞書を読むことを楽しみに”
  • 🇰🇷 “사전 읽기를 즐거움으로”
  • 🇪🇸 “Haz de leer diccionarios un placer”
  • 🇫🇷 “Faire de la lecture de dictionnaires un plaisir”
  • 🇩🇪 “Wörterbücher lesen mit Vergnügen”

📊 Marketing Strategy

Social Media

  • Twitter hashtags: #MDXReader #MacApps #Dictionary
  • Reddit posts: r/MacApps, r/languagelearning
  • Product Hunt: Launch promotion

Content Marketing

  • Blog articles: How to choose a dictionary app
  • Video tutorials: MDX Reader usage guide
  • User stories: Real user learning experiences

Partnership Promotion

  • Language learning blogger collaboration

  • Dictionary resource website partnerships

MDX Reader - Professional Dictionary Reader, Making Learning More Efficient 🚀

🎨 Feature Highlights

Visual Design

  • Gradient Theme: Beautiful blue-purple gradients throughout
