Категория Подробности
Прямой сбор данных Нет
Сбор данных третьими лицами Да (Google AdMob)
Межприложенческое отслеживание Да (можно отказаться)
Данные детей Не собираются и не передаются

11. العربية

سياسة الخصوصية

آخر تحديث: 10 ديسمبر 2025

مقدمة

مرحباً بك في FlipFocus (“نحن” أو “لنا”). نحن نحترم خصوصيتك ونلتزم بحماية بياناتك الشخصية. توضح سياسة الخصوصية هذه كيفية جمع معلوماتك واستخدامها وحمايتها عند استخدام تطبيق الهاتف المحمول FlipFocus (“التطبيق”).

باستخدام التطبيق، فإنك توافق على جمع واستخدام المعلومات وفقاً لسياسة الخصوصية هذه.

المعلومات التي نجمعها

البيانات التي يجمعها FlipFocus

لا يجمع FlipFocus أي بيانات شخصية بشكل مباشر. نحن لا نجمع أو نخزن أو ننقل:

  • معلومات التعريف الشخصية (الاسم، البريد الإلكتروني، رقم الهاتف)
  • بيانات الموقع
  • معلومات جهات الاتصال أو دفتر العناوين
  • الصور أو ملفات الوسائط
  • بيانات الصحة أو اللياقة البدنية
  • المعلومات المالية
  • المحتوى الذي ينشئه المستخدم

البيانات التي تجمعها خدمات الطرف الثالث

ومع ذلك، قد تقوم خدمات الإعلانات من الأطراف الثالثة المدمجة في تطبيقنا بجمع معلومات معينة تلقائياً. على وجه التحديد، قد يجمع Google AdMob البيانات التالية:

نوع البيانات الغرض يجمعها
معرف الجهاز (IDFA) الإعلانات المخصصة، تتبع الإعلانات عبر التطبيقات، قياس أداء الإعلانات Google AdMob
عنوان IP منع الاحتيال، الاستهداف الجغرافي التقريبي، التحليلات Google AdMob
معلومات الجهاز تحسين الإعلانات، توافق الجهاز Google AdMob
بيانات استخدام التطبيق التحليلات، الحد من تكرار الإعلانات Google AdMob

مهم: قد يتم استخدام معرفات الجهاز لعرض إعلانات مخصصة عبر التطبيقات والمواقع، ولقياس أداء الإعلانات. يتم جمع هذه البيانات ومعالجتها بواسطة Google، وليس FlipFocus.

الإعلانات وخياراتك

يمكنك إلغاء الاشتراك في الإعلانات المخصصة والتتبع:

  1. إعدادات iOS: انتقل إلى الإعدادات > الخصوصية والأمان > التتبع > أوقف “السماح للتطبيقات بطلب التتبع”
  2. الموافقة داخل التطبيق: عند ظهور مربع حوار شفافية تتبع التطبيق، اضغط على “اطلب من التطبيق عدم التتبع”

خصوصية الأطفال

FlipFocus مصنف 4+ ومناسب لجميع الأعمار. نحن لا نجمع عن قصد معلومات شخصية من الأطفال دون سن 13 عاماً، ولا نشارك بيانات الأطفال مع أطراف ثالثة لأغراض إعلانية.

اتصل بنا

إذا كانت لديك أي أسئلة حول سياسة الخصوصية هذه، يرجى الاتصال بنا:

البريد الإلكتروني: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

ملخص

الفئة التفاصيل
جمع البيانات المباشر لا يوجد
جمع بيانات الطرف الثالث نعم (Google AdMob)
التتبع عبر التطبيقات نعم (يمكن إلغاء الاشتراك)
بيانات الأطفال لا يتم جمعها أو مشاركتها

12. हिन्दी

गोपनीयता नीति

अंतिम अपडेट: 10 दिसंबर 2025

परिचय

FlipFocus (“हम”, “हमारा” या “हमें”) में आपका स्वागत है। हम आपकी गोपनीयता का सम्मान करते हैं और आपके व्यक्तिगत डेटा की सुरक्षा के लिए प्रतिबद्ध हैं। यह गोपनीयता नीति बताती है कि जब आप हमारे मोबाइल एप्लिकेशन FlipFocus (“ऐप”) का उपयोग करते हैं तो हम आपकी जानकारी कैसे एकत्र, उपयोग और सुरक्षित करते हैं।

ऐप का उपयोग करके, आप इस गोपनीयता नीति के अनुसार जानकारी के संग्रह और उपयोग से सहमत होते हैं।

हम जो जानकारी एकत्र करते हैं

FlipFocus द्वारा एकत्रित डेटा

FlipFocus सीधे कोई व्यक्तिगत डेटा एकत्र नहीं करता है। हम एकत्र, संग्रहीत या प्रसारित नहीं करते हैं:

  • व्यक्तिगत पहचान जानकारी (नाम, ईमेल, फोन नंबर)
  • स्थान डेटा
  • संपर्क या पता पुस्तिका जानकारी
  • फोटो या मीडिया फाइलें
  • स्वास्थ्य या फिटनेस डेटा
  • वित्तीय जानकारी
  • उपयोगकर्ता-जनित सामग्री

तृतीय-पक्ष सेवाओं द्वारा एकत्रित डेटा

हालाँकि, हमारे ऐप में एकीकृत तृतीय-पक्ष विज्ञापन सेवाएं स्वचालित रूप से कुछ जानकारी एकत्र कर सकती हैं। विशेष रूप से, Google AdMob निम्नलिखित डेटा एकत्र कर सकता है:

डेटा प्रकार उद्देश्य द्वारा एकत्रित
डिवाइस पहचानकर्ता (IDFA) वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन, क्रॉस-ऐप विज्ञापन ट्रैकिंग, विज्ञापन प्रदर्शन मापन Google AdMob
IP पता धोखाधड़ी रोकथाम, अनुमानित स्थान लक्ष्यीकरण, विश्लेषण Google AdMob
डिवाइस जानकारी विज्ञापन अनुकूलन, डिवाइस संगतता Google AdMob
ऐप उपयोग डेटा विश्लेषण, विज्ञापन आवृत्ति सीमा Google AdMob

महत्वपूर्ण: डिवाइस पहचानकर्ताओं का उपयोग ऐप्स और वेबसाइटों पर वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन देने और विज्ञापन प्रदर्शन को मापने के लिए किया जा सकता है। यह डेटा FlipFocus द्वारा नहीं, बल्कि Google द्वारा एकत्र और संसाधित किया जाता है।

विज्ञापन और आपकी पसंद

आप वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन और ट्रैकिंग से ऑप्ट-आउट कर सकते हैं:

  1. iOS सेटिंग्स: सेटिंग्स > प्राइवेसी एंड सिक्योरिटी > ट्रैकिंग > “ऐप्स को ट्रैक करने का अनुरोध करने की अनुमति दें” बंद करें
  2. ऐप में सहमति: जब ऐप ट्रैकिंग पारदर्शिता डायलॉग दिखाई दे, “ऐप से ट्रैक न करने का अनुरोध करें” पर टैप करें

बच्चों की गोपनीयता

FlipFocus 4+ रेटेड है और सभी उम्र के लिए उपयुक्त है। हम जानबूझकर 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से व्यक्तिगत जानकारी एकत्र नहीं करते हैं और विज्ञापन उद्देश्यों के लिए बच्चों के डेटा को तृतीय पक्षों के साथ साझा नहीं करते हैं।

हमसे संपर्क करें

यदि इस गोपनीयता नीति के बारे में आपके कोई प्रश्न हैं, तो कृपया हमसे संपर्क करें:

ईमेल: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

सारांश

श्रेणी विवरण
प्रत्यक्ष डेटा संग्रह कोई नहीं
तृतीय-पक्ष डेटा संग्रह हाँ (Google AdMob)
क्रॉस-ऐप ट्रैकिंग हाँ (ऑप्ट-आउट उपलब्ध)
बच्चों का डेटा एकत्र या साझा नहीं किया गया

13. Tiếng Việt

Chính Sách Bảo Mật

Cập nhật lần cuối: 10 tháng 12, 2025

Giới thiệu

Chào mừng bạn đến với FlipFocus (“chúng tôi”). Chúng tôi tôn trọng quyền riêng tư của bạn và cam kết bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân của bạn. Chính Sách Bảo Mật này giải thích cách chúng tôi thu thập, sử dụng và bảo vệ thông tin của bạn khi bạn sử dụng ứng dụng di động FlipFocus (“Ứng dụng”).

Bằng cách sử dụng Ứng dụng, bạn đồng ý với việc thu thập và sử dụng thông tin theo Chính Sách Bảo Mật này.

Thông tin chúng tôi thu thập

Dữ liệu được FlipFocus thu thập

FlipFocus không trực tiếp thu thập bất kỳ dữ liệu cá nhân nào. Chúng tôi không thu thập, lưu trữ hoặc truyền:

  • Thông tin nhận dạng cá nhân (tên, email, số điện thoại)
  • Dữ liệu vị trí
  • Thông tin danh bạ hoặc sổ địa chỉ
  • Ảnh hoặc tệp phương tiện
  • Dữ liệu sức khỏe hoặc thể dục
  • Thông tin tài chính
  • Nội dung do người dùng tạo

Dữ liệu được thu thập bởi dịch vụ bên thứ ba

Tuy nhiên, các dịch vụ quảng cáo của bên thứ ba được tích hợp trong Ứng dụng của chúng tôi có thể tự động thu thập một số thông tin. Cụ thể, Google AdMob có thể thu thập dữ liệu sau:

Loại dữ liệu Mục đích Thu thập bởi
Mã định danh thiết bị (IDFA) Quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa, theo dõi quảng cáo xuyên ứng dụng, đo lường hiệu suất quảng cáo Google AdMob
Địa chỉ IP Phòng chống gian lận, nhắm mục tiêu vị trí gần đúng, phân tích Google AdMob
Thông tin thiết bị Tối ưu hóa quảng cáo, tương thích thiết bị Google AdMob
Dữ liệu sử dụng ứng dụng Phân tích, giới hạn tần suất quảng cáo Google AdMob

Quan trọng: Mã định danh thiết bị có thể được sử dụng để phân phối quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa trên các ứng dụng và trang web, và để đo lường hiệu suất quảng cáo. Dữ liệu này được Google thu thập và xử lý, không phải FlipFocus.

Quảng cáo và lựa chọn của bạn

Bạn có thể từ chối quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa và theo dõi:

  1. Cài đặt iOS: Vào Cài đặt > Quyền riêng tư & Bảo mật > Theo dõi > Tắt “Cho phép ứng dụng yêu cầu theo dõi”
  2. Đồng ý trong ứng dụng: Khi hộp thoại Minh bạch theo dõi ứng dụng xuất hiện, nhấn “Yêu cầu ứng dụng không theo dõi”

Quyền riêng tư của trẻ em

FlipFocus được xếp hạng 4+ và phù hợp với mọi lứa tuổi. Chúng tôi không cố ý thu thập thông tin cá nhân từ trẻ em dưới 13 tuổi và không chia sẻ dữ liệu trẻ em với bên thứ ba cho mục đích quảng cáo.

Liên hệ với chúng tôi

Nếu bạn có bất kỳ câu hỏi nào về Chính Sách Bảo Mật này, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi:

Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Tóm tắt

Danh mục Chi tiết
Thu thập dữ liệu trực tiếp Không
Thu thập dữ liệu bên thứ ba Có (Google AdMob)
Theo dõi xuyên ứng dụng Có (có thể từ chối)
Dữ liệu trẻ em Không thu thập hoặc chia sẻ

14. ไทย

นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัว

อัปเดตล่าสุด: 10 ธันวาคม 2025

บทนำ

ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ FlipFocus (“เรา”) เราเคารพความเป็นส่วนตัวของคุณและมุ่งมั่นที่จะปกป้องข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลของคุณ นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้อธิบายวิธีที่เราเก็บรวบรวม ใช้ และปกป้องข้อมูลของคุณเมื่อคุณใช้แอปพลิเคชันมือถือ FlipFocus (“แอป”)

โดยการใช้แอป คุณยอมรับการเก็บรวบรวมและการใช้ข้อมูลตามนโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้

ข้อมูลที่เราเก็บรวบรวม

ข้อมูลที่เก็บรวบรวมโดย FlipFocus

FlipFocus ไม่เก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลโดยตรง เราไม่เก็บรวบรวม จัดเก็บ หรือส่ง:

  • ข้อมูลระบุตัวตนส่วนบุคคล (ชื่อ อีเมล หมายเลขโทรศัพท์)
  • ข้อมูลตำแหน่งที่ตั้ง
  • ข้อมูลรายชื่อผู้ติดต่อหรือสมุดที่อยู่
  • รูปถ่ายหรือไฟล์สื่อ
  • ข้อมูลสุขภาพหรือฟิตเนส
  • ข้อมูลทางการเงิน
  • เนื้อหาที่ผู้ใช้สร้างขึ้น

ข้อมูลที่เก็บรวบรวมโดยบริการของบุคคลที่สาม

อย่างไรก็ตาม บริการโฆษณาของบุคคลที่สามที่รวมอยู่ในแอปของเราอาจเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลบางอย่างโดยอัตโนมัติ โดยเฉพาะ Google AdMob อาจเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลต่อไปนี้:

ประเภทข้อมูล วัตถุประสงค์ เก็บรวบรวมโดย
ตัวระบุอุปกรณ์ (IDFA) โฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคล การติดตามโฆษณาข้ามแอป การวัดประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา Google AdMob
ที่อยู่ IP การป้องกันการฉ้อโกง การกำหนดเป้าหมายตามตำแหน่งโดยประมาณ การวิเคราะห์ Google AdMob
ข้อมูลอุปกรณ์ การเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา ความเข้ากันได้ของอุปกรณ์ Google AdMob
ข้อมูลการใช้งานแอป การวิเคราะห์ การจำกัดความถี่โฆษณา Google AdMob

สำคัญ: ตัวระบุอุปกรณ์อาจถูกใช้เพื่อแสดงโฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคลข้ามแอปและเว็บไซต์ และเพื่อวัดประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา ข้อมูลนี้ถูกเก็บรวบรวมและประมวลผลโดย Google ไม่ใช่ FlipFocus

โฆษณาและทางเลือกของคุณ

คุณสามารถปฏิเสธโฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคลและการติดตาม:

  1. การตั้งค่า iOS: ไปที่ การตั้งค่า > ความเป็นส่วนตัวและความปลอดภัย > การติดตาม > ปิด “อนุญาตให้แอปขอติดตาม”
  2. ความยินยอมในแอป: เมื่อกล่องโต้ตอบความโปร่งใสในการติดตามแอปปรากฏขึ้น แตะ “ขอให้แอปไม่ติดตาม”

ความเป็นส่วนตัวของเด็ก

FlipFocus ได้รับการจัดอันดับ 4+ และเหมาะสำหรับทุกวัย เราไม่เก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลจากเด็กอายุต่ำกว่า 13 ปีโดยเจตนา และไม่แบ่งปันข้อมูลเด็กกับบุคคลที่สามเพื่อวัตถุประสงค์ในการโฆษณา

ติดต่อเรา

หากคุณมีคำถามเกี่ยวกับนโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้ กรุณาติดต่อเรา:

อีเมล: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

สรุป

หมวดหมู่ รายละเอียด
การเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลโดยตรง ไม่มี
การเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลโดยบุคคลที่สาม ใช่ (Google AdMob)
การติดตามข้ามแอป ใช่ (สามารถปฏิเสธได้)
ข้อมูลเด็ก ไม่เก็บรวบรวมหรือแบ่งปัน

15. Italiano

Informativa sulla Privacy

Ultimo aggiornamento: 10 dicembre 2025

Introduzione

Benvenuto su FlipFocus (“noi”, “nostro” o “ci”). Rispettiamo la tua privacy e ci impegniamo a proteggere i tuoi dati personali. Questa Informativa sulla Privacy spiega come raccogliamo, utilizziamo e proteggiamo le tue informazioni quando utilizzi la nostra applicazione mobile FlipFocus (l’“App”).

Utilizzando l’App, accetti la raccolta e l’utilizzo delle informazioni in conformità con questa Informativa sulla Privacy.

Informazioni che raccogliamo

Dati raccolti da FlipFocus

FlipFocus non raccoglie direttamente alcun dato personale. Non raccogliamo, memorizziamo o trasmettiamo:

  • Informazioni di identificazione personale (nome, email, numero di telefono)
  • Dati sulla posizione
  • Informazioni sui contatti o rubrica
  • Foto o file multimediali
  • Dati sulla salute o fitness
  • Informazioni finanziarie
  • Contenuti generati dall’utente

Dati raccolti da servizi di terze parti

Tuttavia, i servizi pubblicitari di terze parti integrati nella nostra App possono raccogliere automaticamente determinate informazioni. In particolare, Google AdMob può raccogliere i seguenti dati:

Tipo di dati Scopo Raccolto da
Identificatore dispositivo (IDFA) Pubblicità personalizzata, tracciamento pubblicitario cross-app, misurazione delle prestazioni pubblicitarie Google AdMob
Indirizzo IP Prevenzione frodi, targeting geografico approssimativo, analisi Google AdMob
Informazioni sul dispositivo Ottimizzazione degli annunci, compatibilità del dispositivo Google AdMob
Dati di utilizzo dell’app Analisi, limitazione della frequenza degli annunci Google AdMob

Importante: Gli identificatori del dispositivo possono essere utilizzati per fornire annunci personalizzati su app e siti web e per misurare le prestazioni pubblicitarie. Questi dati vengono raccolti ed elaborati da Google, non da FlipFocus.

Pubblicità e le tue scelte

Puoi disattivare la pubblicità personalizzata e il tracciamento:

  1. Impostazioni iOS: Vai su Impostazioni > Privacy e sicurezza > Tracciamento > Disattiva “Consenti alle app di richiedere il tracciamento”
  2. Consenso in-app: Quando appare la finestra di dialogo sulla trasparenza del tracciamento delle app, tocca “Chiedi all’app di non tracciare”

Privacy dei bambini

FlipFocus è classificato 4+ ed è adatto a tutte le età. Non raccogliamo consapevolmente informazioni personali da bambini di età inferiore ai 13 anni e non condividiamo i dati dei bambini con terze parti per scopi pubblicitari.

Contattaci

Se hai domande su questa Informativa sulla Privacy, contattaci:

Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Riepilogo

Categoria Dettagli
Raccolta dati diretta Nessuna
Raccolta dati di terze parti Sì (Google AdMob)
Tracciamento cross-app Sì (opt-out disponibile)
Dati dei bambini Non raccolti o condivisi

End of Privacy Policy / 隐私政策结束 / プライバシーポリシー終了

item.title: Privacy Policy - SG BusNow!
item.description:
Privacy Policy / 隐私政策

Last Updated: December 2025

最后更新：2025年12月

English Version

Introduction

SG BusNow! (“we”, “our”, or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Location Information

  • When Collected: Only when you actively use features that require location (e.g., finding nearby stops, trip tracking)
  • Purpose: To show nearby bus stops/MRT stations and provide real-time trip tracking
  • Storage: Location data is processed locally on your device and is not stored on our servers
  • Background Location: Used only during active trip tracking to provide arrival notifications. You can disable this in Settings.

2. Usage Data

  • What We Collect: App interactions, feature usage patterns, crash reports
  • Purpose: To improve app performance and user experience
  • Third-Party Analytics: We use Google AdMob which may collect anonymous usage data

3. Saved Preferences

  • What We Collect: Favorite stops, saved routes, language preferences, theme settings
  • Storage: Stored locally on your device only
  • Sync: This data is not synced to any cloud service

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect:
item.content:
Privacy Policy / 隐私政策

Last Updated: December 2025

最后更新：2025年12月

English Version

Introduction

SG BusNow! (“we”, “our”, or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Location Information

  • When Collected: Only when you actively use features that require location (e.g., finding nearby stops, trip tracking)
  • Purpose: To show nearby bus stops/MRT stations and provide real-time trip tracking
  • Storage: Location data is processed locally on your device and is not stored on our servers
  • Background Location: Used only during active trip tracking to provide arrival notifications. You can disable this in Settings.

2. Usage Data

  • What We Collect: App interactions, feature usage patterns, crash reports
  • Purpose: To improve app performance and user experience
  • Third-Party Analytics: We use Google AdMob which may collect anonymous usage data

3. Saved Preferences

  • What We Collect: Favorite stops, saved routes, language preferences, theme settings
  • Storage: Stored locally on your device only
  • Sync: This data is not synced to any cloud service

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect:

  • Device identifiers (with your consent via App Tracking Transparency)
  • IP address
  • General location (city-level)
  • App usage data

For more information, see Google’s Privacy Policy

LTA DataMall API

We use Singapore’s Land Transport Authority (LTA) DataMall API to fetch real-time bus arrival and route information. This is public transport data and does not involve personal information.

OneMap API

We use Singapore’s OneMap API for route planning and map services. No personal data is shared with this service.

Data Sharing

We do NOT:

  • Sell your personal data to third parties
  • Share your location history with anyone
  • Store your data on external servers
  • Create user profiles or accounts

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Disable Location: Turn off location services for this app in your device Settings
  • Opt-out of Tracking: Deny tracking permission when prompted (iOS 14.5+)
  • Delete Local Data: Uninstall the app to remove all locally stored data
  • Disable Notifications: Turn off notifications in device Settings

Children’s Privacy

This app is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures:

  • All API communications use HTTPS encryption
  • No personal data is transmitted to our servers
  • Local data is protected by iOS security features

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by updating the “Last Updated” date.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

  • Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

中文版本

简介

SG BusNow!（以下简称"我们"或"本应用"）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明了我们在您使用本移动应用时如何收集、使用和保护您的信息。

我们收集的信息

1. 位置信息

  • 收集时机：仅在您主动使用需要位置的功能时（如查找附近站点、行程追踪）
  • 用途：显示附近的公交站/地铁站，提供实时行程追踪
  • 存储：位置数据在您的设备上本地处理，不会存储在我们的服务器上
  • 后台定位：仅在活跃行程追踪期间使用，用于提供到站提醒。您可以在设置中禁用此功能。

2. 使用数据

  • 收集内容：应用交互、功能使用模式、崩溃报告
  • 用途：改善应用性能和用户体验
  • 第三方分析：我们使用 Google AdMob，可能收集匿名使用数据

3. 保存的偏好设置

  • 收集内容：收藏的站点、保存的路线、语言偏好、主题设置
  • 存储：仅存储在您的设备本地
  • 同步：这些数据不会同步到任何云服务

第三方服务

Google AdMob

我们使用 Google AdMob 展示广告。AdMob 可能收集：

  • 设备标识符（需您通过 App Tracking Transparency 授权）
  • IP 地址
  • 大致位置（城市级别）
  • 应用使用数据

更多信息请参阅 Google 隐私政策

LTA DataMall API

我们使用新加坡陆路交通管理局（LTA）DataMall API 获取实时公交到站和路线信息。这是公共交通数据，不涉及个人信息。

OneMap API

我们使用新加坡 OneMap API 进行路线规划和地图服务。不会与此服务共享任何个人数据。

数据共享

我们不会：

  • 将您的个人数据出售给第三方
  • 与任何人分享您的位置历史
  • 将您的数据存储在外部服务器
  • 创建用户档案或账户

您的权利

您有权：

  • 禁用定位：在设备设置中关闭本应用的位置服务
  • 拒绝追踪：在提示时拒绝追踪权限（iOS 14.5+）
  • 删除本地数据：卸载应用以删除所有本地存储的数据
  • 禁用通知：在设备设置中关闭通知

儿童隐私

本应用不面向 13 岁以下儿童。我们不会故意收集儿童的个人信息。

数据安全

我们实施适当的安全措施：

  • 所有 API 通信使用 HTTPS 加密
  • 不向我们的服务器传输个人数据
  • 本地数据受 iOS 安全功能保护

政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。我们将通过更新"最后更新"日期来通知您任何变更。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们：

  • 电子邮件：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

© 2025 SG BusNow! All rights reserved.

item.title: SG BusNow! One page
item.description:
Singapore’s Smartest Public Transport Companion

🎯 The Problem We Solve

Every Day in Singapore, Commuters Face These Challenges:

“Will I miss my stop?”
Unlike MRT trains, Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Foreign tourists and even locals often miss their destination, especially on unfamiliar routes.

“When will my bus actually arrive?”
Bus stop displays show estimated times, but they’re not always accurate. Commuters waste time waiting or rush unnecessarily.

“How do I get there?”
Planning trips across multiple transport modes (bus + MRT + walking) is complex. Most apps only show one mode at a time.
item.content:
Singapore’s Smartest Public Transport Companion

🎯 The Problem We Solve

Every Day in Singapore, Commuters Face These Challenges:

“Will I miss my stop?”
Unlike MRT trains, Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Foreign tourists and even locals often miss their destination, especially on unfamiliar routes.

“When will my bus actually arrive?”
Bus stop displays show estimated times, but they’re not always accurate. Commuters waste time waiting or rush unnecessarily.

“How do I get there?”
Planning trips across multiple transport modes (bus + MRT + walking) is complex. Most apps only show one mode at a time.

“Where are the nearby stops?”
New residents and tourists struggle to find bus stops and understand which services to take.

✨ Introducing SG BusNow!

Your AI-Powered Transport Assistant

SG BusNow! is the ultimate companion for navigating Singapore’s public transport system. With real-time data, intelligent route planning, and smart arrival alerts, we make every journey effortless and stress-free.

🏆 Winner Features

🔔 Never Miss Your Stop Again
Our unique “Smart Stop Alert” uses GPS tracking to notify you exactly 1 stop before your destination. With vibration, sound, and visual alerts, you’ll never miss your stop again.

⏱️ Real-Time Arrivals You Can Trust
Live arrival times for all 5,000+ bus stops island-wide, powered by official LTA data. See the next 3 buses with wheelchair accessibility information.

🗺️ One-Tap Journey Planning
Planning a trip? Just enter your destination. We’ll calculate the best route combining buses, MRT, and walking - with fare estimates and journey time.

📍 Live Trip Tracking
Track your journey in real-time on an interactive map. See exactly where you are on the route, how many stops remaining, and when you’ll arrive.

⭐ Your Personal Transport Hub
Save your favorite stops, routes, and destinations. Quick access from the home screen widget means your commute is just one tap away.

🌏 Designed for Everyone
Available in 6 languages: English, 简体中文, Bahasa Melayu, தமிழ், 日本語, 한국어. Perfect for locals, expats, and tourists.

🎨 Beautiful by Design

Modern Interface, Effortless Experience

Dark Mode Native
Stunning dark theme reduces eye strain during night commutes. Automatic switching based on system settings or manual control.

Gradient Design System
Beautiful purple-to-blue gradients create a premium, modern feel. Every screen is crafted with attention to detail.

Intuitive Navigation
Clean, simple interface that anyone can use. Large buttons, clear labels, and logical flow make navigation effortless.

Smooth Animations
Delightful micro-interactions and smooth transitions make every tap feel responsive and premium.

🚌 Core Features

1. Real-Time Bus Arrivals

See What’s Coming, Right Now

  • Live Updates: Arrival times update every 20 seconds
  • Next 3 Buses: See all upcoming buses at once
  • Bus Capacity: Know if the bus is crowded before it arrives
  • Wheelchair Info: Accessibility information for every bus
  • Service Details: Full route information and operating hours

Use Case:
“It’s 8:45 AM. You need to catch the 190 bus. Open SG BusNow!, see it’s arriving in 3 minutes, and leave your flat at the perfect time.”

2. MRT & LRT Network Hub

Complete MRT System at Your Fingertips

  • 9 MRT/LRT Lines: Coverage of entire Singapore network

    • East-West Line (Green)
    • North-South Line (Red)
    • Circle Line (Yellow)
    • Downtown Line (Blue)
    • Thomson-East Coast Line (Brown)
    • North-East Line (Purple)
    • Bukit Panjang LRT (Grey)
    • Sengkang LRT (Grey)
    • Punggol LRT (Grey)

  • Station Details: Exit information, first/last train times

  • Service Alerts: Real-time disruption updates

  • Interactive Map: Visual network map with station search

  • Line-Specific Themes: Each line has its authentic color

Use Case:
“You’re at Orchard. Going to Changi Airport. MRT Hub shows you: Take Red Line to Tanah Merah, transfer to Green Line. 45 minutes total.”

3. Multi-Modal Trip Planning

The Smartest Way to Get Around

How It Works:

  1. Enter Destination - Type any address or place name
  2. See Route Options - Multiple routes with different combinations
  3. Choose Your Route - Compare by time, transfers, or walking distance
  4. Start Trip - One tap begins live tracking

Route Details Include:

  • Total journey time
  • Number of transfers
  • Walking distance and duration
  • Bus numbers and MRT lines
  • Fare estimate (coming soon)
  • Step-by-step instructions

Example Route:

Home → Vivocity (35 minutes)
├─ Walk 5 min to Bus Stop 12345
├─ Bus 100 (8 stops, 12 min)
├─ Walk 2 min to Harbourfront MRT
├─ MRT Circle Line (3 stops, 8 min)
└─ Walk 3 min to destination

Use Case:
“Meeting friends at Marina Bay Sands. One tap shows 3 route options. You choose the fastest: Bus + MRT combo. 28 minutes door-to-door.”

4. Smart Stop Alerts

Our Signature Feature - Never Miss Your Stop

The Problem:
Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Tourists and locals alike miss their destination, especially when unfamiliar with the route or distracted by their phone.

Our Solution:
GPS-based proximity detection with multiple alert types:

Alert Triggers:

  • 2 Stops Away: Heads up notification
  • 1 Stop Away: Strong alert (vibration + sound + visual)
  • Destination Reached: Confirmation notification

Alert Modes:

  • 🔊 Sound Alert: Clear “Next stop!” announcement
  • 📳 Vibration: Strong haptic feedback
  • 📱 Visual Alert: Full-screen notification
  • 🌙 Silent Mode: Visual only for quiet environments

Smart Features:

  • Works in background (app closed)
  • Battery optimized
  • Accurate to within 50 meters
  • Adapts to bus speed

Use Case:
“You’re on Bus 170 reading a book. GPS detects you’re 1 stop away. Phone vibrates strongly, shows ‘Next Stop: Orchard Road.’ You press the stop button. Perfect.”

5. Live Trip Tracking

See Your Journey Unfold in Real-Time

During Your Trip:

  • Interactive Map: Your position updates every 5 seconds
  • Progress Timeline: Visual indicator showing completed and upcoming stops
  • Dynamic Updates: “Next stop in 2 minutes” countdown
  • Arrival Prediction: Estimated arrival time at destination

Multi-Segment Support:

  • Track bus segments
  • Track MRT segments
  • Walking navigation between transfers
  • Seamless transitions between modes

Trip Information:

  • Current segment (e.g., “On Bus 190”)
  • Stops remaining
  • Next stop name
  • Time to destination
  • Transfer instructions when approaching

Use Case:
“First time taking this route. Map shows exactly where you are. Timeline highlights your current position. You can relax knowing the app is watching.”

6. Nearby Stops Discovery

Find Stops Around You Instantly

Features:

  • Auto-Detection: Shows nearest 20 stops automatically
  • Distance Display: “50m away” or “5 min walk”
  • Type Indicators: Bus stop or MRT station
  • Service List: See which buses serve each stop
  • Map View: Visual layout of all nearby stops
  • Quick Actions: One tap to see arrivals

Smart Sorting:

  • By distance (closest first)
  • By stop type (bus/MRT)
  • By number of services

Use Case:
“New office location, first day. Open Nearby Stops. See 3 bus stops within 200m. Find one serving your home route. Save it to favorites.”

7. Favorites & Quick Access

Your Commute, One Tap Away

What You Can Save:

  • Favorite Stops: Home stop, office stop, gym stop
  • Favorite Bus Lines: Your regular services
  • Saved Routes: Complete door-to-door journeys
  • Recent Searches: Quick re-access to recent destinations

Home Screen Widget:

  • Live arrivals for your saved stops
  • One-tap access to saved routes
  • Quick trip start button

Smart Features:

  • Nickname your stops (“Home,” “Office,” “Mom’s Place”)
  • Group favorites by category
  • Sync across devices (coming soon)

Use Case:
“Every morning: Check widget → See Bus 190 in 5 min → Leave house. Every evening: One tap ‘Go Home’ → Navigation starts.”

8. Bus Route Explorer

Understand Singapore’s Bus Network

Complete Route Information:

  • Full Route Map: Interactive map showing entire route
  • All Stops Listed: Both directions with stop codes
  • Operating Hours: First and last bus times
  • Service Type: Express, trunk, feeder, night bus
  • Operator: SBS Transit, SMRT, etc.
  • Loop Routes: Clearly marked circular routes

Visual Timeline:

  • See all stops in order
  • Tap any stop to see arrivals
  • Distance between stops
  • Current bus positions (when tracking)

Use Case:
“Thinking of taking a new bus. Open Route Explorer. See it passes through Orchard and Marina Bay. Perfect for weekend trips. Add to favorites.”

9. Intelligent Search

Find Anything, Fast

Unified Search Bar: Type once, find everything:

  • Bus Stops: By name, code, or road
  • Bus Services: By number
  • MRT Stations: By name or code
  • Places: “Changi Airport,” “Marina Bay Sands”
  • Addresses: Full Singapore addresses

Smart Features:

  • Instant Results: As you type
  • Fuzzy Matching: “ochard” finds “Orchard”
  • Recent Searches: Quick access to history
  • Popular Destinations: Trending searches
  • Multilingual: Search in any supported language

Search Examples:

  • “12345” → Finds stop code 12345
  • “190” → Finds Bus Service 190
  • “Orchard” → Shows stops on Orchard Road + Orchard MRT
  • “airport” → Changi Airport + buses + MRT route

Use Case:
“Friend says ‘Meet at Vivo.’ Type ‘vivo’ → See Vivocity, HarbourFront MRT, nearby bus stops. Pick one → Get directions.”

🌟 Why Choose SG BusNow!

For Daily Commuters

Save Time Every Day

  • Check arrivals before leaving home
  • Never wait unnecessarily at stops
  • Optimize your commute route

Reduce Stress

  • Smart alerts mean no missed stops
  • Real-time tracking eliminates uncertainty
  • Backup routes when buses are delayed

Your Routine, Simplified

  • Favorites and widgets make regular trips effortless
  • Predictable journey times
  • Plan around actual arrival times, not schedules

For Tourists & Visitors

Navigate with Confidence

  • 6 languages support
  • Visual route guidance
  • No local knowledge required

Cultural Sensitivity

  • Interface adapted for Asian markets
  • Familiar UI patterns
  • Clear, simple English

Stress-Free Exploration

  • Discover Singapore independently
  • Avoid tourist taxi traps
  • Experience local transport safely

For Families

Peace of Mind

  • Track elderly parents’ journeys
  • Teach kids public transport safely
  • Family-friendly interface

Accessibility

  • Wheelchair-accessible bus information
  • Large text options
  • Voice guidance for visually impaired

For Students

Budget-Friendly Travel

  • Public transport is cheapest
  • Fare estimates help planning
  • Optimize routes to save time

Campus Commuting

  • Save school stops and routes
  • Share routes with classmates
  • Night bus information for late library sessions

📊 By The Numbers

Singapore Transport Stats

5,000+ Bus Stops
Complete coverage of Singapore’s entire bus network

200+ Bus Services
All SBS Transit and SMRT services included

130+ MRT/LRT Stations
9 lines, full network coverage

20 Seconds
Real-time arrival updates frequency

30+ Million
Annual public transport trips in Singapore

App Performance

4.8★ Average Rating (Target)
Based on beta testing feedback

95% Accuracy
Stop alert precision rate

< 2 Seconds
Average search response time

99.9% Uptime
Service availability

50MB
App storage (includes offline data)

🎁 Pricing & Premium Features

Free Forever Core Features

Everything You Need:

  • ✅ Real-time bus arrivals
  • ✅ MRT network information
  • ✅ Multi-modal trip planning
  • ✅ Live GPS tracking
  • ✅ Smart stop alerts
  • ✅ Favorites and saved routes
  • ✅ Nearby stops discovery
  • ✅ Complete search functionality
  • ✅ All 6 languages

With Ads:
Non-intrusive banner ads at bottom of screens. Limited interstitial ads after trip completion (max 3 per session).

Premium: Ad-Free Experience

One-Time Purchase: $4.99 SGD

Benefits:

  • ✅ Remove all advertisements
  • ✅ Support app development
  • ✅ Lifetime access (one-time payment)
  • ✅ All future features included
  • ✅ Priority customer support

Also Get Ad-Free Through:

  • 🎁 Invite Codes: Special promotional codes
  • 🎥 Watch Ad: Get 1 hour ad-free by watching one video
  • 🎁 New User Grace Period: 3 days ad-free for new installs

🚀 Coming Soon

Planned Features (2025 Roadmap)

Q1 2025: Enhanced Trip Planning

  • 🔄 Real-time bus crowding predictions
  • 💰 Actual fare calculations
  • 🕐 Historical arrival time analysis
  • ☔ Weather-aware route suggestions

Q2 2025: Social Features

  • 👥 Share routes with friends
  • 💬 Community stop ratings
  • 📊 Crowding reports from users
  • 🎯 Popular destinations

Q3 2025: Smart Integrations

  • 📱 Apple Watch app
  • 🎧 Siri Shortcuts
  • 📍 CarPlay for taxis/Grab
  • 🏠 Smart home integration

Q4 2025: AI-Powered Features

  • 🤖 Predictive route suggestions
  • 📈 Commute pattern learning
  • ⚡ Real-time disruption avoidance
  • 🎯 Personalized recommendations

🌐 Multi-Language Support

Truly Local, Globally Accessible

6 Languages, Fully Translated:

🇬🇧 English
Primary language, complete coverage

🇨🇳 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)
For Chinese-speaking residents and tourists

🇲🇾 Bahasa Melayu (Malay)
For Malay-speaking community

🇮🇳 தமிழ் (Tamil)
For Tamil-speaking community

🇯🇵 日本語 (Japanese)
For Japanese tourists and residents

🇰🇷 한국어 (Korean)
For Korean tourists and residents

What’s Translated:

  • All UI text and buttons
  • Stop and station names (Romanized)
  • Instruction text
  • Error messages
  • Notification text
  • Settings and preferences

🛡️ Privacy & Security

Your Data Stays Yours

We Don’t Collect:

  • ❌ Personal information
  • ❌ Location history
  • ❌ Search history (stored remotely)
  • ❌ Travel patterns
  • ❌ Payment information (handled by Apple)

We Only Use:

  • ✅ Current location (for nearby stops and tracking)
  • ✅ App preferences (stored locally)
  • ✅ Favorites (stored on your device)
  • ✅ Anonymous crash reports (optional)

Data Processing:

  • All location processing happens on-device
  • No data sent to our servers
  • API calls only to LTA and OneMap (official sources)
  • No third-party analytics

Your Control:

  • Disable location anytime
  • Clear all data in settings
  • Delete app removes all data
  • No account required

🏅 Awards & Recognition

Featured by Apple (Target)
“New Apps We Love” - Singapore App Store

Beta Tester Reviews:

“Finally! An app that actually works for Singapore transport. The stop alerts are a game-changer.”
— Sarah T., Daily Commuter

“As a tourist, this made exploring Singapore so much easier. The multi-language support is excellent.”
— Kenji M., Japan

“Better than Google Maps for Singapore. The real-time tracking actually works.”
— Michael L., Expat

“Clean interface, fast, accurate. My go-to transport app now.”
— Priya S., Student

📱 Technical Excellence

Built for Performance

Fast & Responsive

  • 60 FPS smooth animations
  • < 3 second cold start
  • Instant search results
  • Optimized battery usage

Reliable

  • Offline mode with cached data
  • Automatic retry on network errors
  • Graceful degradation
  • Background refresh

Modern

  • Native iOS design
  • Dark mode support
  • Haptic feedback
  • Dynamic Type support

Accessible

  • VoiceOver compatible
  • Large text support
  • High contrast mode
  • Reduced motion option

🌏 Data Sources

Official, Reliable, Real-Time

Land Transport Authority (LTA) Singapore

  • Real-time bus arrival data
  • Bus stop locations and codes
  • Bus service routes
  • MRT service alerts

OneMap Singapore

  • Official government mapping service
  • Location search and geocoding
  • Route planning algorithms
  • Walking directions

Why Official Sources Matter:

  • ✅ Most accurate data available
  • ✅ Real-time updates
  • ✅ Government-backed reliability
  • ✅ Comprehensive coverage

🎯 Use Cases & Scenarios

Morning Commute

6:45 AM - Time to Leave?

Traditional way:
Estimate bus time → Leave house → Wait 15 minutes → Bus packed

With SG BusNow!:

  • Check widget: “Bus 190 - 8 min”
  • Finish coffee
  • Leave at 6:52
  • Arrive at stop at 6:53
  • Bus arrives 6:54 ✅

Tourist Exploration

Visiting Singapore for 5 Days

Day 1:
Land at Changi → Search “Marina Bay Sands”
→ See MRT + Bus options → Choose fastest route
→ Live tracking all the way → Arrive confident ✅

Day 2-5:
All favorites saved → One-tap navigation
→ Explore like a local → Save money on taxis
→ Use Tamil language mode → Share routes with family ✅

Evening Journey Home

6:30 PM - Heading Home After Work

The Challenge:
Unfamiliar bus route, might miss stop while scrolling social media

With Smart Stop Alert:

  • Start trip in app
  • Use phone freely
  • Get “1 stop away” alert
  • Press stop button
  • Exit perfectly ✅

Weekend Adventure

Saturday - Trying New Restaurant

Planning:

  • Search “East Coast Park”
  • See 3 route options
  • Choose: Bus + MRT (35 min, 1 transfer)
  • Save route

During Trip:

  • Live map shows progress
  • Walking navigation between transfers
  • “Arriving in 5 minutes” countdown
  • Reach on time ✅

Emergency Route Change

MRT Breakdown - Need Alternative

Real Scenario:
Downtown Line disrupted, need to reach office

With SG BusNow!:

  • App shows MRT alert
  • Re-plan trip with bus-only route
  • See alternative: 2 buses, 15 min longer
  • Track journey in real-time
  • Update ETA to colleagues ✅

💬 Frequently Asked Questions

General

Q: Is SG BusNow! free to use?
A: Yes! All core features are completely free. We offer an optional ad-free premium experience for $4.99 SGD (one-time purchase).

Q: Does it work offline?
A: Partially. We cache 5,000+ bus stops and routes, so you can browse offline. Real-time arrivals require internet.

Q: Which languages are supported?
A: English, 简体中文, Bahasa Melayu, தமிழ், 日本語, and 한국어.

Q: Do I need to create an account?
A: No account needed! All your data stays on your device.

Features

Q: How accurate are the arrival times?
A: We use official LTA data, updated every 20 seconds. Accuracy is typically within 1 minute.

Q: Will I get notified if I’m about to miss my stop?
A: Yes! Our Smart Stop Alert uses GPS to notify you 1 stop before your destination, even if the app is closed.

Q: Can I plan trips that combine bus and MRT?
A: Absolutely! Our multi-modal planning automatically combines buses, MRT, and walking for the best route.

Q: Does it show bus crowding?
A: Yes, we show capacity levels (Seats Available / Standing Available / Limited Standing) for each arriving bus.

Technical

Q: Does it drain my battery?
A: No. Location tracking is optimized and only active during trips. Background refresh is minimal.

Q: What iOS version do I need?
A: iOS 15.0 or later. Works on all iPhones from iPhone 6S onwards.

Q: Does it work on iPad?
A: Yes, universal app optimized for both iPhone and iPad.

Q: Can I use it on Apple Watch?
A: Coming Q2 2025!

Privacy

Q: Do you track my location?
A: We only use your location when you actively use location features (nearby stops, trip tracking). Location is processed on-device and never stored.

Q: Do you sell my data?
A: Never. We don’t collect personal data, so there’s nothing to sell.

Q: What data do ads collect?
A: Ads are served by Google AdMob. They may collect device identifiers for personalized ads (you can opt-out via iOS settings).

📞 Contact & Support

Get Help, Share Feedback

Email Support
levi.duan.arts@gmail.com
Response within 24 hours

App Store Reviews
Leave feedback on the App Store
We read every review

Bug Reports
Found an issue? Email us with:

  • What happened
  • Which screen/feature
  • Screenshots if possible

Feature Requests
We love hearing your ideas!
Email your suggestions

🎉 Download Today

Ready to Transform Your Commute?

Available on the App Store

Get Started in 3 Steps:

  1. Download SG BusNow! (Free)
  2. Allow location permission
  3. Start exploring Singapore!

What You Get Immediately:

  • ✅ Real-time arrivals for 5,000+ stops
  • ✅ Complete MRT network
  • ✅ Smart trip planning
  • ✅ Live GPS tracking
  • ✅ Stop alerts
  • ✅ Multi-language support

No Credit Card Required
No Account Needed
No Ads for First 3 Days

item.title: Privacy Policy for TidyPic
item.description:
Last Updated: January 5, 2026

Introduction

TidyPic (“we,” “our,” or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Photo Library Access

  • What We Access: TidyPic requires access to your photo library to scan for screenshots, videos, duplicate photos, and similar photos.
  • How We Use It: All photo scanning and analysis is performed locally on your device. We do not upload, store, or transmit your photos to any external servers.
  • User Control: You can revoke photo library access at any time through your device’s Settings > Privacy > Photos.

2. Device Storage Information

  • We collect information about your device’s storage capacity and usage to display storage statistics.
  • This data is processed locally and is not transmitted to external servers.

3. In-App Purchase Information

  • When you purchase the Premium version, Apple processes the transaction through their secure payment system.
  • We do not collect or store your payment information.
  • We only receive a verification that the purchase was successful.

4. Analytics and Crash Reports (Optional)

  • We may collect anonymous usage statistics and crash reports to improve app performance.
  • This information does not include any personal data or photos.
  • You can opt out of analytics in your device settings.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:
item.content:
Last Updated: January 5, 2026

Introduction

TidyPic (“we,” “our,” or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Photo Library Access

  • What We Access: TidyPic requires access to your photo library to scan for screenshots, videos, duplicate photos, and similar photos.
  • How We Use It: All photo scanning and analysis is performed locally on your device. We do not upload, store, or transmit your photos to any external servers.
  • User Control: You can revoke photo library access at any time through your device’s Settings > Privacy > Photos.

2. Device Storage Information

  • We collect information about your device’s storage capacity and usage to display storage statistics.
  • This data is processed locally and is not transmitted to external servers.

3. In-App Purchase Information

  • When you purchase the Premium version, Apple processes the transaction through their secure payment system.
  • We do not collect or store your payment information.
  • We only receive a verification that the purchase was successful.

4. Analytics and Crash Reports (Optional)

  • We may collect anonymous usage statistics and crash reports to improve app performance.
  • This information does not include any personal data or photos.
  • You can opt out of analytics in your device settings.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Identify and help you delete duplicate or similar photos
  • Display storage and memory usage statistics
  • Provide premium features to paying users
  • Improve app performance and fix bugs

Data Storage and Security

  • Local Processing: All photo analysis is performed locally on your device.
  • No Cloud Storage: We do not upload or store your photos on any external servers.
  • No Third-Party Access: Your photos are never shared with third parties.
  • Secure Deletion: When you delete photos through TidyPic, they are permanently removed from your device according to iOS system policies.

Third-Party Services

TidyPic uses the following Apple services:

  • StoreKit: For processing in-app purchases
  • PhotoKit: For accessing your photo library
  • WidgetKit: For displaying home screen widgets

These are Apple’s native frameworks and follow Apple’s privacy policies.

Children’s Privacy

TidyPic does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access: View what data the app uses (locally on your device)
  • Deletion: Delete the app and all associated data at any time
  • Opt-Out: Disable photo library access in device settings
  • Contact: Reach out with privacy concerns

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by:

  • Posting the new Privacy Policy in the app
  • Updating the “Last Updated” date

Data Retention

  • We do not retain any of your photos or personal data.
  • All processing is done locally on your device.
  • Deleting the app removes all associated data.

International Users

TidyPic is available worldwide. By using the app, you consent to the processing of your information as described in this Privacy Policy, regardless of your location.

Consent

By using TidyPic, you consent to this Privacy Policy.

Summary

TidyPic respects your privacy:

  • ✅ All processing is done locally on your device
  • ✅ We never upload your photos
  • ✅ We don’t collect personal information
  • ✅ You have full control over your data
  • ✅ Your photos remain private and secure

This privacy policy complies with Apple’s App Store Review Guidelines and applicable data protection laws.

TidyPic（净图）隐私政策

最后更新日期：2026年1月5日

引言

TidyPic（净图，以下简称"我们"、“本应用”）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明了您在使用我们的移动应用程序时，我们如何处理您的信息。

我们收集的信息

1. 照片库访问权限

  • 访问内容：TidyPic 需要访问您的照片库，以扫描截图、视频、重复照片和相似照片。
  • 使用方式：所有照片扫描和分析均在您的设备本地完成。我们不会上传、存储或传输您的照片到任何外部服务器。
  • 用户控制：您可以随时通过设备的"设置 > 隐私 > 照片"撤销照片库访问权限。

2. 设备存储信息

  • 我们会收集您设备的存储容量和使用情况信息，以显示存储统计数据。
  • 这些数据在本地处理，不会传输到外部服务器。

3. 应用内购买信息

  • 当您购买高级版时，Apple 通过其安全支付系统处理交易。
  • 我们不收集或存储您的支付信息。
  • 我们仅收到购买成功的验证信息。

4. 分析和崩溃报告（可选）

  • 我们可能会收集匿名使用统计数据和崩溃报告，以改进应用性能。
  • 这些信息不包含任何个人数据或照片。
  • 您可以在设备设置中选择退出分析。

我们如何使用您的信息

我们使用收集的信息用于：

  • 识别并帮助您删除重复或相似的照片
  • 显示存储和内存使用统计数据
  • 为付费用户提供高级功能
  • 改进应用性能并修复错误

数据存储和安全

  • 本地处理：所有照片分析均在您的设备本地完成。
  • 无云存储：我们不会将您的照片上传或存储到任何外部服务器。
  • 无第三方访问：您的照片绝不会与第三方共享。
  • 安全删除：当您通过 TidyPic 删除照片时，它们会根据 iOS 系统策略从您的设备中永久删除。

第三方服务

TidyPic 使用以下 Apple 服务：

  • StoreKit：用于处理应用内购买
  • PhotoKit：用于访问您的照片库
  • WidgetKit：用于显示主屏幕小组件

这些是 Apple 的原生框架，遵循 Apple 的隐私政策。

儿童隐私

TidyPic 不会故意收集 13 岁以下儿童的个人信息。如果您是父母或监护人，并认为您的孩子向我们提供了个人信息，请联系我们。

您的权利

您有权：

  • 访问：查看应用使用的数据（本地存储在您的设备上）
  • 删除：随时删除应用及所有相关数据
  • 退出：在设备设置中禁用照片库访问
  • 联系：提出隐私问题

隐私政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。我们将通过以下方式通知您任何更改：

  • 在应用中发布新的隐私政策
  • 更新"最后更新日期"

数据保留

  • 我们不保留您的任何照片或个人数据。
  • 所有处理均在您的设备本地完成。
  • 删除应用将删除所有相关数据。

国际用户

TidyPic 在全球范围内可用。使用本应用即表示您同意按照本隐私政策中的描述处理您的信息，无论您身在何处。

同意

使用 TidyPic 即表示您同意本隐私政策。

总结

TidyPic 尊重您的隐私：

  • ✅ 所有处理均在您的设备本地完成
  • ✅ 我们绝不上传您的照片
  • ✅ 我们不收集个人信息
  • ✅ 您可以完全控制您的数据
  • ✅ 您的照片保持私密和安全

本隐私政策符合 Apple App Store 审核指南和适用的数据保护法律。
